name: Mitch Kates, Executive Director, PA Dems
subject: can you stand with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter – I just wanted to reach out one last time before the ball drops at midnight.

I know this next year feels uncertain for us all, but now is not the time to give up hope. We have a chance in the coming months to limit the control MAGA extremists have on our state. From upcoming state Supreme Court elections to the 2026 midterms, **we’re still in this.**

**[But we need you to stand with us. I’m asking one last time – can you chip in before midnight to help us reach our end of year goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99629684/520468492/2119800170?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20241231_FR_EOY_0_3MO_Mitch_NA_NA_1.6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjIwOTE0YS1kM2M3LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zwh8e2Tqyi2hDgV907Jj30um3i9FOyBvXhw9FRkaqYM=)**

Thank you for joining us. Together, we can protect our Commonwealth.

– Mitch Kates

| Peter,

Happy New Year! I know you’re probably getting ready to spend the evening with family and friends, so I won’t keep you too long. Tonight, I’m spending time with my husband, Adam, and our three daughters, and as you know, this new year is going to be a critical one for our Commonwealth and our campaign.

So, before I sign off for the evening, I wanted to ask for your help one more time. This is our final reporting deadline for 2024, and it will set the stage for our election in 2025 and show our financial position to the public for everyone to see, so it’s crucial that we show our strength in numbers.

Our party stands united, resilient, and ready to take on the challenges of 2026. That means laying a strong foundation in 2025 consisting of a grassroots majority ready to win statewide and secure a blue Arizona up and down the ticket. This party is the Party that fights for Arizonan values — Democrats are working day in and day out to lower the cost of living, protect our fundamental freedoms and right to abortion access, and keep our communities safe, healthy, and secure. name: The DC Bugle
subject: Alvin Bragg may end up in Court to Face one Charge That no one saw Coming

name: Laura (personal)
subject: Before 2025 starts:
body:
Friend,
I know you’ve heard from me and my team quite a bit over the past couple of days, but midnight tonight marks a critical fundraising deadline – our final FEC deadline of 2024. As it stands, we're still coming up short, so I had to reach out one last time. We only have $2,327 left to raise.
Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99631946/520492686/158001685?refcode=em-12.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg4OTc4ZTMtZDhjNy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=301UAU1QIMfCds1p1nzOsIrxDGyR-CQ5jw0qf9LtMIw=)**
I’m so proud of the winning campaign we’ve built over the past year – the local support we’ve amassed, and the issues we’ve highlighted. I know we can do it again next year, but it depends on each of us coming together behind our shared values.
So please, add a donation of $3 or more to help us hit our goal before we enter 2025. I know we can do this.
Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99631947/520492687/158001685?refcode=em-12.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg4OTc4ZTMtZDhjNy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=301UAU1QIMfCds1p1nzOsIrxDGyR-CQ5jw0qf9LtMIw=)**
Thank you, and Happy New Year!
Laura Friedman

* * *
Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: About love, resistance, hope, and fighting for a brighter dawn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
What's possible when we dream beyond the corruption we see and imagine a new future together.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2439%2E4032634%2EspaXdZ)
---
New Year’s Eve is special for me. Each and every year on New Year’s Eve Bruce and I watch Casablanca: a story about love, loyalty, and courage. About how people resist dark forces and survive — even against all odds. About hope — for young people on the threshold of building a new life, and old people looking for a safe landing place — praying and fighting for a brighter dawn for each other. It was with this spirit six years ago today that I officially announced an exploratory committee to run for president, with the idea that working people — not corporations, not bank executives, not far-right ideologies, not billionaires — should hold political and economic power in our country. And five years ago today in 2019 as a candidate for president, I spoke at the historic Old South Meeting House in Boston about what's possible when we dream beyond the corruption we see and imagine a new future together. I’d like to share a bit of that speech with you tonight:

* * *

_So as we turn the page tomorrow — into an election year and a new decade — there is a chill of fear in the air. People are afraid. Afraid for their families and neighbors. Afraid for the children locked in our detention centers and the children on lockdown in our schools. Afraid for women, LGBTQ+ people, especially trans people whose rights will be decided in the Supreme Court next year. Afraid for our country. Afraid for our planet. And the danger they feel is real. Our democracy hangs in the balance. And now it comes to us — now it comes to us to fight back. We are a nation that fights back. Fighting back is an act of patriotism. We fought back against a king and an empire to form a new republic. We fought back against the scourge of slavery even after it was written into our constitution. We fought back against worldwide economic depressions. We fought back against fascist tyrants. Those moments in American history define us. And at each one of them, if our leaders had approached the moment thinking small, we would not have made it through. Americans do big things. That's who we are. And our best moments as a country have been when we see a challenge clearly and we mobilize to meet it head on. And that is why I come to you on this New Year's Eve with a heart filled with optimism. We became the world's leading industrial producer and simultaneously gave workers the right to join unions and the right to live decent lives. We created breakthroughs in science and technology and connected the world through the internet. We rocketed to the moon. We created some of the most beautiful and profound art and music the world has ever seen or read or heard. And these achievements, these victories — not one of them was born of fear. They were born of boldness and big dreams. They were rooted in our unique ability to turn despair into hope, fear into courage, improbability into triumph. They were born of our ability to imagine a better world, to imagine it so clearly and so thoroughly that we fought for it with everything we had — and turned things we could only imagine into reality._

* * *

I share this with you now because the dreams we imagine for a better world are still possible — and worth fighting for — on this New Year's Eve. Together, we can choose hope over fear, courage over timidity, and dreams over cynicism. It’s going to take hard work in 2025 and beyond. But I know this team is up to the task. And I’m asking if you can chip in to help keep up the fight, and the hope. [**Please make a donation, if you can, to help hit our fundraising goal before tonight’s last FEC deadline of the year. $3 or whatever you can contribute would go a long way to help make our movement even stronger for 2025 and beyond.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2886?t=8&akid=2439%2E4032634%2EspaXdZ)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---

---

---

---

Have a safe and happy New Year's Eve, and thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Before the ball drops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:

name: George Whitesides
subject: The last time I’ll ask in 2024
body:
The countdown is on, Peter!

I’m getting ready to ring in the new year with my family, but before the celebration can begin, I’m focused on hitting our final FEC goal of 2024.

We’re just $3,250 shy of our $50,000 goal. It would mean a lot to me if you chipped in $3 or any amount to push us over the edge:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99632616/520503038/2104826962?refcode=em-12.31.24-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmE2NDhiYS1kYmM3LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nS3LQjTeE4xamFOlclVxCF6QbtojGJ19y_gG9qaehig=)**

I’m days away from being sworn into Congress and starting the real work of delivering for the people of CA-27.

I can’t help but reflect on all it took to get to this moment. With your support – and the support of thousands across the district – we flipped this seat blue and defeated a Trump Republican in one of the toughest election years for Democrats.

Now, the real work begins. With just a razor-thin majority, Congress has become more divisive than ever. We’ll face big challenges, and I know this seat will be a top target for the GOP.

Reaching our $50,000 goal by midnight will show the strength of our movement and that we’re ready to fight for what matters.

Can I count on you to chip in $3 before the clock strikes midnight?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99632618/520503040/2104826962?refcode=em-12.31.24-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmE2NDhiYS1kYmM3LWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nS3LQjTeE4xamFOlclVxCF6QbtojGJ19y_gG9qaehig=)**

Thank you, and happy New Year!

– George

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States

subject: Are You Ready for 2025?
body:
The Rocky Mountain Voice Has Big Plans!
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
Happy New Year!
[Before you bust out the champagne and get ready to ring in 2025, please consider making a year-end, tax deductible gift to the Rocky Mountain Voice!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
We have big plans for 2025 that will expand our reach and utilize more effective resources to turn the tide in Colorado. By donating today, you can be part of this mission to guide our ship back to sanity and prosperity!
---
[Give Now!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Your [tax-deductible donation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) will go directly towards educating and engaging liberty-loving citizens across this state. From video content, shows, podcasts, and daily headlines, the Rocky Mountain Voice is here to make sure you stay up to speed on everything happening in our state and beyond.
Of course, if you have already made your end of year gift, thank you for being part of this movement! Your support is the lifeline of our work.
2025 will be about transformation and building what’s been missing in Colorado—a strong, trusted, and effective governance. Together, we will continue to challenge the woke narrative and return Colorado to the free and thriving frontier of the West!.
| | |

**Heidi Ganahl** **CEO, Rocky Mountain Voice**

body:
you’re one of only a handful of supporters selected to sign
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries: “House Democrats Will Take a Blowtorch to Project 2025”** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats — and with major special elections coming up, _he could be our SPEAKER!_

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. We need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85670?t=6&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85670?t=7&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85670?t=8&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House NEXT YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85670?t=9&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85670?t=10&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85671?t=11&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18336%2E878179%2EE5mLaH).**

name: Kate Berry
subject: Fw: We’re THIS close
body:
Hi Peter,
I love seeing all the names and donations come in at this time of year. It’s humbling to see how many people love our redwood forests.
We haven’t yet seen your name on the donor list this time, and I know how meaningful the redwoods are to you. I didn’t want you to miss a chance to have your donation make triple the impact to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods. The match ends at midnight.
When you give now, I’ll make sure your donation has 3x the power: [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/scr-gt-2](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99637106/520518502/-1700217077?contactdata=d4Si5Mc7ZKsBoAs9lkFK8uLcP4LJNpXvB1x2bMYbZuR4hqxpmGhC2i3mFoooK9T14J6e2TZcpsubm26aaZDNul9yTHq09rAB8b2ASx8WVSHTXBi12Xt9+cLhWV9b6S8nKNSnB2xctGx2ou5psKAFv6XY3GWFIqa45RKbTuTDx4M=&ms=YE24_EM18_Link1&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3Mjk0YmRkLWUxYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XGY6EbnaSkgmrlGAQG6R4P3Gh8OTr2ZGTzZteC-HS94=&emci=5893fc80-64bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87294bdd-e1c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)
With mere hours to go in this match, we really are in crunch mode now, and Sonoma Coast Redwoods are so breathtaking and special. This is an iconic landscape of forested California coastline more than twice the size of Central Park – and it needs to be protected.
Here’s the link again: [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/scr-gt-2](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99637107/520518503/-1700217077?contactdata=d4Si5Mc7ZKsBoAs9lkFK8uLcP4LJNpXvB1x2bMYbZuR4hqxpmGhC2i3mFoooK9T14J6e2TZcpsubm26aaZDNul9yTHq09rAB8b2ASx8WVSHTXBi12Xt9+cLhWV9b6S8nKNSnB2xctGx2ou5psKAFv6XY3GWFIqa45RKbTuTDx4M=&ms=YE24_EM18_Link2&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3Mjk0YmRkLWUxYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XGY6EbnaSkgmrlGAQG6R4P3Gh8OTr2ZGTzZteC-HS94=&emci=5893fc80-64bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87294bdd-e1c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)
Thank you for being such a generous supporter! Happy New Year!
-Kate

Dear Peter,
As the sun sets on the last day of the year, you still have time to make a great impact on Sonoma Coast Redwoods.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99637110/520518506/-1700217077?contactdata=d4Si5Mc7ZKsBoAs9lkFK8uLcP4LJNpXvB1x2bMYbZuR4hqxpmGhC2i3mFoooK9T14J6e2TZcpsubm26aaZDNul9yTHq09rAB8b2ASx8WVSHTXBi12Xt9+cLhWV9b6S8nKNSnB2xctGx2ou5psKAFv6XY3GWFIqa45RKbTuTDx4M=&ms=YE24_EM18_Img2&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3Mjk0YmRkLWUxYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XGY6EbnaSkgmrlGAQG6R4P3Gh8OTr2ZGTzZteC-HS94=&emci=5893fc80-64bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87294bdd-e1c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)
[**Make your gift have TRIPLE the impact before midnight**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99637111/520518507/-1700217077?contactdata=d4Si5Mc7ZKsBoAs9lkFK8uLcP4LJNpXvB1x2bMYbZuR4hqxpmGhC2i3mFoooK9T14J6e2TZcpsubm26aaZDNul9yTHq09rAB8b2ASx8WVSHTXBi12Xt9+cLhWV9b6S8nKNSnB2xctGx2ou5psKAFv6XY3GWFIqa45RKbTuTDx4M=&ms=YE24_EM18_Link1&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3Mjk0YmRkLWUxYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XGY6EbnaSkgmrlGAQG6R4P3Gh8OTr2ZGTzZteC-HS94=&emci=5893fc80-64bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87294bdd-e1c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)
To recap, this is what we’ll save when you help us protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods:
* **1,624 acres** of mixed-age redwoods, including some of California’s oldest second-growth trees and **some old-growth giants that have reigned for up to 1,000 years**
* Stands of young, recovering trees that will **store significant carbon** as they grow
* A habitat teeming with **native plant and animal species** , including the Northern spotted owl
* The potential **“missing link” completing the California Coastal Trail** and reconnecting Sonoma’s redwood corridor

---
In other words, this place is special. Opportunities like this do not arise every day, and we count on supporters like you to bring these projects to fruition.
[**3x MATCH: Give before time runs out to TRIPLE your impact**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99637112/520518508/-1700217077?contactdata=d4Si5Mc7ZKsBoAs9lkFK8uLcP4LJNpXvB1x2bMYbZuR4hqxpmGhC2i3mFoooK9T14J6e2TZcpsubm26aaZDNul9yTHq09rAB8b2ASx8WVSHTXBi12Xt9+cLhWV9b6S8nKNSnB2xctGx2ou5psKAFv6XY3GWFIqa45RKbTuTDx4M=&ms=YE24_EM18_Link2&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3Mjk0YmRkLWUxYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XGY6EbnaSkgmrlGAQG6R4P3Gh8OTr2ZGTzZteC-HS94=&emci=5893fc80-64bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=87294bdd-e1c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)
We’re down to the wire, Peter. Let’s make it happen!

clean_body: Hi Peter, I love seeing all the names and donations come in at this time of year. It’s humbling to see how many people love our redwood forests. We haven’t yet seen your name on the donor list this time, and I know how meaningful the redwoods are to you. I didn’t want you to miss a chance to have your donation make triple the impact to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods. The match ends at midnight. When you give now, I’ll make sure your donation has 3x the power: With mere hours to go in this match, we really are in crunch mode now, and Sonoma Coast Redwoods are so breathtaking and special. This is an iconic landscape of forested California coastline more than twice the size of Central Park – and it needs to be protected. Here’s the link again: Thank you for being such a generous supporter! Happy New Year! -Kate \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tim Whalen <membership@savetheredwoods.org> Date: Tues, Dec 31, at 4:02 PM Subject: 🤏 We’re THIS close To: You <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Dear Peter, As the sun sets on the last day of the year, you still have time to make a great impact on Sonoma Coast Redwoods. To recap, this is what we’ll save when you help us protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods: 1,624 acres of mixed-age redwoods, including some of California’s oldest second-growth trees and some old-growth giants that have reigned for up to 1,000 years Stands of young, recovering trees that will store significant carbon as they grow A habitat teeming with native plant and animal species , including the Northern spotted owl The potential “missing link” completing the California Coastal Trail and reconnecting Sonoma’s redwood corridor In other words, this place is special. Opportunities like this do not arise every day, and we count on supporters like you to bring these projects to fruition. We’re down to the wire, Peter. Let’s make it happen! | Tim Whalen Chief Development Officer ---|--- Photos by Justin Lewis, Coldwater Collective | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I need you by my side in this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We made some important progress under President Biden, but there are still many important fights that will continue in 2025.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241231-4635-footer&t=1&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)
Peter, before the clock strikes midnight, I wanted to reflect on where we are and the work we need to do in 2025:
In 2024, gun violence remained the leading cause of death for American children for the second year in a row.
**Don't tell me we don’t need an assault weapons ban.**
This year, the total amount of medical debt owed in the United States was _$220,000,000,000_ — hurting more than 14 million people.
**Don't tell me Medicare for All is not essential.**
In the first five years since Trump’s tax cuts went into effect, 18 of the largest companies in America paid ZERO in taxes despite bringing in BILLIONS in profits. All while millions of workers struggle to make ends meet.
**Don't tell me we can't close the loopholes, level the playing field, and make sure the wealthiest people and corporations pay their fair share.**
As we head toward a new Trump administration and a Republican Congress, Democrats will be a line of defense against the MAGA GOP’s worst impulses.
But in addition to being an _opposition_ party, we must also be a _proposition_ party that brings working people in with a bold, populist agenda — on issues like Medicare for All, gun violence, paid leave, and more.
[**If you're ready to keep up the fight for our progressive values, chip in $3 or any amount you can afford toward our $20,000 end-of-year fundraising goal coming up at midnight TONIGHT.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241231-2?refcode=em20241231-4635&amount=3&refcode2=4635_420207_BvfjXo&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241231-2?amount=3&refcode=em20241231-4635&refcode2=4635_420207_BvfjXo&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)**
**We made some important progress under President Biden, but there are still important fights that will continue in 2025** — from protecting democracy and getting Big Money out of politics to protections for working families and more.
**With Republicans controlling the White House and Congress, I need you by my side in this fight.**
Before the clock strikes midnight, we have to close a fundraising gap in order to reach our final fundraising goal of the year. [**Can you contribute whatever you can to show the strength of our movement for bold, progressive change as we head into the new year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241231-2?refcode=em20241231-4635&amount=3&refcode2=4635_420207_BvfjXo&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)
Talk soon (in 2025),
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241231-4635-footer&t=2&refcode2=4635_420207_BvfjXo&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4635%2E420207%2EBvfjXo)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team AOC
subject: A personal link for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Since it’s New Year’s Eve, we’ll get right to the point.
With just hours until our end-of-year deadline, we have an important ask to make of you:
Will you donate $5 or any amount that is meaningful to you before midnight? We’ve set up a personalized link just for you:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241231-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241231-2.DlsSP9&refcode=em20241231-7839-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7839%2E2526796%2EQck_J6)
This election cycle alone we hosted hundreds of events, knocked over 130,000 doors, and made over 139,000 phone calls to encourage voters to vote. All of that work is only possible because of supporters like you.
Together, we re-elected Alexandria to Congress this year and defeated her MAGA Republican opponent. Now, with the incoming Trump administration, we know our work will be cut out for us to fight back against his corruption and hatred.
**So we want to ask, will you make a $5 donation today to help us reach our $2.2 million end-of-year fundraising goal?** When thousands of people chip in what they can, it shows the power of this movement.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241231-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241231-2.DlsSP9&refcode=em20241231-7839-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7839%2E2526796%2EQck_J6)
No matter what, thank you for being here. We hope you have a joyful and safe New Year’s Eve.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241231-2?refcode=em20241231-7839-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=3&refcode2=7839_2526796_Qck_J6&akid=7839%2E2526796%2EQck_J6)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241231-7839-P_FND_EOQ_LNK&t=4&akid=7839%2E2526796%2EQck_J6)**

clean_body: Since it’s New Year’s Eve, we’ll get right to the point. With just hours until our end-of-year deadline, we have an important ask to make of you: Will you donate $5 or any amount that is meaningful to you before midnight? We’ve set up a personalized link just for you: This election cycle alone we hosted hundreds of events, knocked over 130,000 doors, and made over 139,000 phone calls to encourage voters to vote. All of that work is only possible because of supporters like you. Together, we re-elected Alexandria to Congress this year and defeated her MAGA Republican opponent. Now, with the incoming Trump administration, we know our work will be cut out for us to fight back against his corruption and hatred. So we want to ask, will you make a $5 donation today to help us reach our $2.2 million end-of-year fundraising goal? When thousands of people chip in what they can, it shows the power of this movement. No matter what, thank you for being here. We hope you have a joyful and safe New Year’s Eve. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: FINAL UPDATE: Our midnight deadline is in just a few hours, Peter... The environment is counting on us.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE5MzMzMzIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDc2NTUxOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
I’ll make this quick, Peter — We’re still short of our $25,000 year-end
fundraising goal, but there’s still time to renew your LCV membership for 2025. Right now, $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv. For nearly 20 years, I’ve been proud to serve this incredible movement as LCV’s
president. As I prepare to pass the torch next year, I know that our movement is more important than ever. In the new year, we’ll all need to join together to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda and protect our
environment. The truth is that fighting back against polluters’ agenda — in Congress, in the
states, and in the streets — takes ongoing effort and significant resources. We rely on support from LCV members to make our campaigns work — especially in
this coming year. That’s why I hope you’ll renew your 2025 LCV membership for just $5 before tonight’s deadline. https://links.messages.lcv. Together, we can keep our movement strong to protect people and our planet this
year and every year. Thank you, Peter, and Happy New Year. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters Peter — Midnight is a major fundraising deadline here at LCV, and we’re
still a few thousand dollars short of our year-end goal. Meeting this goal
matters, and here’s why: At this time next month, a narrow anti-environmental majority will control
Congress, and Donald Trump will be in the White House taking immediate and
drastic action to undermine environmental progress. We’re expecting Trump and
his billionaire allies to move swiftly to authorize a massive expansion of oil and gas drilling on public lands, make enormous cuts
to environmental agencies, and withdraw support for affordable clean energy
alternatives like electric vehicles. The environmental movement needs to be ready to respond with strategies to
mobilize leaders and the public to protect our communities and our climate. If you were waiting for the most important moment to make a gift for the
environment, now is that moment. LCV has a plan to oppose this expensive and dirty energy agenda — in Congress,
in the states, and in the streets — but it’s going to take all of us together. This will require significant resources, and we need your help to make our
environmental campaigns work. Please renew your LCV membership for 2025 today. It only takes $5. Each gift helps us fight back against Trump’s disastrous anti-environmental agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfE93b~ How our movement responds to attacks on our environment in January 2025 will set
the tone for the next four years, Peter. That’s why it’s so crucial
that we reach this $25,000 fundraising goal. If anti-environmental Republicans are able to enact their agenda — accelerating
climate change, giving polluters free rein to poison our air and water while
gouging us all, and handing over our public lands to their corporate fossil fuel
backers — it will be disastrous for people and the planet. The environmental movement must do everything possible to stop them. We’re so close to reaching our midnight fundraising goal, but we need to hear
from you, Peter. Please, take a moment to review your status below and
then renew your 2025 LCV membership for just $5 before tonight’s deadline: https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBGexWEB~ LEAGUE OF CONSERVATION VOTERS
YEAR END SUPPORTER STATUS

Supporter Name: Peter Willis
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Fundraising Goal: $25,000
DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT on TUESDAY, DECEMBER 31

Membership Status: RENEW NOW FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks in advance for helping us fight for people and the planet in 2025! From
all of us at LCV, we wish you a happy New Year. Onward, LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11933332&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDc2NTUxOAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDc2NTUxOAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11933332&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDc2NTUxOAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDc2NTUxOAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Hi Peter,

In just a few days, I’ll be sworn in as your Congresswoman, and I want to hear from you before I take office.

I know this election season has been tough, and the challenges ahead are real. But Oregonians voted to protect the right to choose, defend democracy, and build an economy that works for everyone. I was elected to champion those values, but your input will shape how I fight for you in Congress.

[**What should my top priorities be? What challenges does your community face? Share your thoughts—I’m here to listen, with empathy and resolve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99639252/520520437/445750432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ1NDZkMTgtZTRjNy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YvqZpcSoJULQQK6sqh6EU4_t-vP9_bNFYnINMPnZTdY=&emci=4826fb71-73c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=6d546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9506338)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, there’s 6 hours left to use your Political Tax Credit!
body:
| | | Dear Peter, Before your New Year's celebrations begin, don’t forget that you have 6 hours left to make sure your Oregon Political Tax Credit doesn’t go to waste! [**If you use your Political Tax Credit this year, that means you can make a $50 or $100 contribution to OLCV to fund the fight for climate action in 2025, and get it back when you file your taxes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99639302/520520482/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTQ2ZDE4LWU0YzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gJP-2nPRVR2kPCwnMhukEjqw2CNcyuvK1kurK1jrSM=&emci=326bcaea-a5bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) By now, you all know the work that is ahead of us next year. You know what your gift will do for our climate and environment, and what it will do for future generations. The time to act for our climate is now, and that all starts with our generous donors. # Dear Peter, it’s New Years Eve, and all of us at OLCV want to be one of the first to wish you a Happy New Year!
---
We want to express our appreciation for your membership throughout this past year.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99639317/520520578/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTQ2ZDE4LWU0YzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gJP-2nPRVR2kPCwnMhukEjqw2CNcyuvK1kurK1jrSM=&emci=326bcaea-a5bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
One great way you can celebrate the end of 2024 and the start of 2025 is to make use of Oregon’s Political Tax Credit! Have you heard of it? [**Well, with Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, you can make a free contribution of $50 or $100 to OLCV PAC, to get back when you file your taxes!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99639319/520520582/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTQ2ZDE4LWU0YzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gJP-2nPRVR2kPCwnMhukEjqw2CNcyuvK1kurK1jrSM=&emci=326bcaea-a5bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) This money expires at midnight tonight, so make sure this free donation gets put to use now. You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if: ✔ You are an Oregon resident ✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2024✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99639325/520520584/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTQ2ZDE4LWU0YzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gJP-2nPRVR2kPCwnMhukEjqw2CNcyuvK1kurK1jrSM=&emci=326bcaea-a5bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
If you’ve already used your Political Tax Credit this year, [**please consider making a year end contribution to OLCV to fund our critical work to protect our climate in 2025.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99639328/520520590/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTQ2ZDE4LWU0YzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2gJP-2nPRVR2kPCwnMhukEjqw2CNcyuvK1kurK1jrSM=&emci=326bcaea-a5bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=63546d18-e4c7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) 2025 will start off with a bang, with the 2025 long legislative session beginning at the end of January. All of us at OLCV are already getting ready to protect our clean air and water, make sure Oregonians have access to affordable energy, improve our communities’ climate resiliency, and pass an equitable and climate-friendly transportation package. That’s why our end-of-year gifts are extremely important to our work!
---
| | [**We need your help now to ensure we have what it takes to win big for our climate during 2025’s legislative session. name: Keith
subject: Last time this year
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

I’m so grateful for everything you did to support us this year. You helped us organize, reach out to people most campaigns overlook, and keep Minnesota blue in what proved to be a tough year for Democrats across the country.

With Donald Trump set to take office for the second time on January 20, know that our work together will be more important than ever next year.

I didn’t run for Attorney General so I could sue President Trump. But I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again if he attempts to interfere with any of the freedoms that people of our state enjoy, including access to abortion and immigrants’ ability to live without fear.

Peter, I will always fight to protect your fundamental rights from those who seek to restrict them. But I can’t do it alone.

We need to prove that our people-powered movement is prepared for the fight ahead, and that starts with reaching our first and only public deadline goal of the year before 11:59 pm tonight.

My team just let me know that we’re still about $4,600 short, so I’m reaching out one last time this year:

Will you take advantage of the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program and make a REFUNDABLE $75 donation by 11:59 pm so we can close this gap and start the New Year strong?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?refcode=other]

Happy New Year,

Keith Ellison

You can use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241231_2ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/rnmAh_BZp0CUaBw6XYl7Xw2?unsubscribedata=u0yPYQwtY2ZMcqzdgQ9zujnOB8bs%2BRByxa6rgDWJT83xW69x3dxoISTJcTV31Um4a5%2F%2BjMcQhDmOj1FsFf%2BaIdkEbUeDHs72RLVN4mh4nG4elDs1S461qDJeywhoElBkcK7svGueDazMxiUoOJowUSrdlM8VVybh1PELt00boSXA1dhEUqahPDmxOmIxnGZjJzZuCJ8Ag2GWP4xB8VXAsHV1EwT5AxO5mAfAptQ1B7fWXqrx7nM%2BMKoQrX83TrnsY%2FxzXRerql8G6BHnFfaL0ZdcshMsKh%2FalRJ8qgT59QCjAaG1NvLsij%2F71DKpH0byPlwcFkrXerZqdU5TGoib7B%2F7WpRmrSoMohTUWIsuFEDKKsQDiNW1tsB1LjSJsIXbvafQQ9G%2B0FPslR%2FFdgmx%2BGy%2FLv9dyHnd26au1p9rKXAJcKEwKpH%2BF9AUyjGYaeYf .

But I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again if he attempts to interfere with any of the freedoms that people of our state enjoy, including access to abortion and immigrants’ ability to live without fear. Peter, I will always fight to protect your fundamental rights from those who seek to restrict them. But I can’t do it alone. We need to prove that our people-powered movement is prepared for the fight ahead, and that starts with reaching our first and only public deadline goal of the year before 11:59 pm tonight. My team just let me know that we’re still about $4,600 short, so I’m reaching out one last time this year: Will you take advantage of the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program and make a REFUNDABLE $75 donation by 11:59 pm so we can close this gap and start the New Year strong? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CHIP IN $10 NOW [] CHIP IN $25 NOW [] CHIP IN $75 NOW [] CHIP IN $150 NOW [] CHIP IN $250 NOW [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Happy New Year, Keith Ellison You can use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota. Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect. CONTRIBUTE [] Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General PO Box 17224 Minneapolis, MN 55417 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

subject: Last call: Please donate $3 to the DNC before our final deadline of 2024
body:
We’ll get straight to the point.
---
$3. One time. That is the donation we’re asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee before you log off to celebrate the new year, and before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight. $3 because we can’t just sit back and let Trump and his allies do whatever they want without a fight. $3 because this moment requires a strong, robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and prevent the worst of Trump and his allies’ disastrous Project 2025 agenda from becoming our reality. $3 because the DNC is the organization best positioned to move urgent resources to the places they’re needed most as we take on the fights ahead. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

Thanks for all your help this year, Peter. — Quentin James Founder of The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: Alcala, Camille [EXTERNAL]
subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi there.
I know it’s getting late, but I just took a look at our ActBlue and we’re only $1,482.67 away from our FEC Filing Deadline goal.
I wouldn’t email again, but this is our final FEC Filing Deadline before Donald Trump is sworn in for President. When our numbers go public, GOP operatives and media pundits will pore over our numbers to find any weaknesses. We can’t give them a key opening literally days before Donald Trump returns to the White House.
That’s why I’m sending out a few emails this evening. Can I count on you to make a $ donation toward our goal? My personal link is below, and I hope to see your gift come in as I monitor results all night:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-dec24?&refcode=&amount=]
Sincerely,
Camille
Finance Director
CADEM

body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99643992/520526543/779512579?contactdata=/GPA+cETM9DlMCmYaV5xzv6DC7rz5cpl5FUPj/rpnez5eWhLOqB1zIwusJdl+k3amn8lq/bjp+8mcK8OAYjjhgtWx7H25k/8rih1LQYJpwybjHdy0q05RczgAaIzya5G/YiA20DE+5h/4GjtwNSuTfb5QE+2y3zs9Xppt32BB50=&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhOTE1NDQ5LWVlYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I9vuOQ-z1evvAuaWXS7BJYmLPEhpB5kMubgUwakW20M=&emci=2aa9b1fe-66bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7a915449-eec7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551)

This is it, Peter:
The last chance to [**have your dollars have 3x the impact to purchase and protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99643994/520526545/-1700217077?contactdata=/GPA+cETM9DlMCmYaV5xzv6DC7rz5cpl5FUPj/rpnez5eWhLOqB1zIwusJdl+k3amn8lq/bjp+8mcK8OAYjjhgtWx7H25k/8rih1LQYJpwybjHdy0q05RczgAaIzya5G/YiA20DE+5h/4GjtwNSuTfb5QE+2y3zs9Xppt32BB50=&ms=YE24_EM19_Link1&sourceid=1165968&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhOTE1NDQ5LWVlYzctZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I9vuOQ-z1evvAuaWXS7BJYmLPEhpB5kMubgUwakW20M=&emci=2aa9b1fe-66bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7a915449-eec7-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1504551).
This beautiful, classic California landscape is the ancestral home of the Kashia Band of Pomo. It’s a habitat with rich biodiversity. It’s a place where forest lovers like us can continue to come for generations to experience the awe-inspiring redwood forests.

name: Eric Underwood, Chairman
subject: *RESULTS* - NEGOP Truth in Taxation Poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
**CORRECTED Graph Legend - Tax Reform Priority Graph | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2744a9bdea92/n41kepo7ku-12725643?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=42bae1c4e6&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter, Chairman Underwood here.

**CORRECTED Graph Legend - Tax Reform Priority. Apologies as the colors and alignment misrepresented the survey results. Count & Percentage indicate Property Tax reduction is the PRIORITY for Nebraskans.

Thank you to all who participated in the NEGOP Priority Poll on _**Truth in Taxation**_. As promised, I wanted to reach out to you FIRST with the results. Almost **450 responses** came in and provided a CLEAR picture of what is YOUR taxation priorities. Property taxes are impacting Nebraskans and we have to BOLD and make a change sooner rather than later.
* Almost all have education beyond High school, whether OTJ, Military, or College
* Experienced in life
* They HAVE to reduce their family spending.
* Almost 3/5's are or have considered leaving Nebraska!
* They are about half rural and half urban — by far the largest segment being urban home-owners.
* About 84% want reduced property tax levies.
* 84% are willing to raise sales tax rates IF, and ONLY IF, tax revenue INCREASE was necessary AFTER prioritizing REDUCING GOVERNMENT SPENDING.

The party will study demographic responses soonest and present information to other party leaders. The NEGOP will work with our Unicameral Senators to make sure your VOICE is heard.

---
| | NEBRASKA'S VOICES

_Most noticeable to me is the increase in everyday items. I rent, and my landlord has been quite benevolent in not raising rent much. The price of groceries and gas has increased in the last few years, but I know for sure the gas price is artificially increased. My nephew is a CPA and works for a large Midwest convenience store corporation. He said they're just raising the gas prices to see how much people will pay, and that the gas segment of the convenience store has, by far, been more profitable in the last 4 years than the in-store sales. Normally, in-store sales are the profit generator. It's all just a game of corporate greed. _

\--Fremont, Ne

_Increase housing which increased insurance. The value of a county going up should reduce the millevy but it just give the county more money to spend._

\--Hastings, Ne

_Our retirement income is based on the rental money we get from the 3 small (4 units each) apartments we own._

\--Norfolk, Ne

_Goods and supplies. My home is not very expensive, so taxes are not to terrible. But the cost of medical services and Insurance is through the roof ridiculous. But Insurance is ridiculous!_

\--Oakland, Ne

_Spending is out of control. If I ran my family budget like the federal, state and county does the law would be after me. I am a disabled veteran and it is becoming more difficult to maintain._

\--Dakota City, Ne

_As a retired person with a paid off mortgage, my largest annual expense is property tax. I can control my spending on other goods but I can’t change my property tax. This tax is a threat to continued homeownership for Seniors._

\--Kearney, Ne

_Property taxes on a new house are very high. Recent reductions in income tax have been beneficial in exempting military retirement pay and federal employee retirement._

\--Papillion, Ne

_Housing costs and other real estate taxes. Way out of control. Need to eliminate Real Estate taxes with EPIC option!_

\--Scottsbluff, Ne

_My farm in Jefferson county is nearly 10k annually for less than 160 acres. I don’t know how the farmers can make it! Our politicians don’t seem to have a plan except to spend and are beholden to education. I’ve reached out but minimal response back! Or the response is..’ you’re not in my district’ or ‘ that’s the way it is’_

\--Lincoln, Ne

_Buying groceries for my family of 6 has been difficult in just the last 2 years. I can’t leave the store without spending at least $200 on things that won’t even last me a week. Property taxes have become so high we have considered moving to another state to get some relief. Home owner’s insurance is another story too. We are almost where we can’t afford our monthly payment between property taxes and insurance increases._

\--Omaha, Ne

The price of groceries and gas has increased in the last few years, but I know for sure the gas price is artificially increased. My nephew is a CPA and works for a large Midwest convenience store corporation. He said they're just raising the gas prices to see how much people will pay, and that the gas segment of the convenience store has, by far, been more profitable in the last 4 years than the in-store sales. Normally, in-store sales are the profit generator. It's all just a game of corporate greed. \--Fremont, Ne Increase housing which increased insurance. The value of a county going up should reduce the millevy but it just give the county more money to spend. \--Hastings, Ne Our retirement income is based on the rental money we get from the 3 small (4 units each) apartments we own. \--Norfolk, Ne Goods and supplies. My home is not very expensive, so taxes are not to terrible. But the cost of medical services and Insurance is through the roof ridiculous. But Insurance is ridiculous! \--Oakland, Ne Spending is out of control. If I ran my family budget like the federal, state and county does the law would be after me. I am a disabled veteran and it is becoming more difficult to maintain. \--Dakota City, Ne As a retired person with a paid off mortgage, my largest annual expense is property tax. I can control my spending on other goods but I can’t change my property tax. This tax is a threat to continued homeownership for Seniors. \--Kearney, Ne Property taxes on a new house are very high. Recent reductions in income tax have been beneficial in exempting military retirement pay and federal employee retirement. \--Papillion, Ne Housing costs and other real estate taxes. Way out of control. Need to eliminate Real Estate taxes with EPIC option! \--Scottsbluff, Ne My farm in Jefferson county is nearly 10k annually for less than 160 acres. I don’t know how the farmers can make it! Our politicians don’t seem to have a plan except to spend and are beholden to education. I’ve reached out but minimal response back! Or the response is..’ you’re not in my district’ or ‘ that’s the way it is’ \--Lincoln, Ne Buying groceries for my family of 6 has been difficult in just the last 2 years. I can’t leave the store without spending at least $200 on things that won’t even last me a week. Property taxes have become so high we have considered moving to another state to get some relief. Home owner’s insurance is another story too. We are almost where we can’t afford our monthly payment between property taxes and insurance increases. \--Omaha, Ne | "🇺🇸Become a NEGOP+ Chairman's Club Member " | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2024 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: My final ask of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=9y7xZ5j%2FhdMKr5%2B8%2B7r3gjIw7h%2BPmnTfqRLV5UHRBrZDTIvY8hEAGHIv%2FmHnSdcPqVEsGvMTZfqLgEGQS0hocgfUgRwCCUpTfV4F2REugYSCn017O6cGNfGx6S7o2rCpmxnlX7WVpq5%2Fj9UF93D00Lpe2nCm6leO4FKhqb0Fd5CW7DXgdNtpElkvs%2BWTDv2z5EcAVCbIV%2Bl3wcZWRlmlgenibpmDI9CaCmvXLE71z8wH7e5Ojlgth6wmc%2BF5mma6azNbA4ZO5E6wdzgYTtl0h3EO6xExzDbmYHMtOYXrLz1ayLbn%2FFyE5hGrqepz5JS9VhSnGATuMnTS8%2BStalQ%2F%2BTA6NRLUTVKPqJ5L7ERc9S7H27rpNkIXUQq9DYmSMDXb137roeJ0o6u4koqVH%2BadNlD%2BtuoVehaSc3Slptix323gKNXT1Gevngap4w6T2kv0]

# [#]
I know it’s getting late on New Year’s Eve, so I won’t keep you long.

Tonight at midnight marks more than the turn to 2025 — it’s our campaign’s final FEC-mandated fundraising deadline of the year.

Hitting our $15,000 benchmark is critical if we want to kick off the new year with the resources we need to keep up our fight for progress, and falling short isn’t an option.

In a time like this, what we’re able to raise is more than a number — it’s a sign of our strength as we enter into an unprecedented Republican trifecta in Washington.

And right now, standing united against attacks on our rights, our democracy, and our future is more than a want — it’s a need. For our families, for our friends, and for our community.

We’re just $3,417 away from hitting our goal, and I’m counting on my top supporters to come through with a donation of $ to help us cross the finish line and enter 2025 with the momentum we need to take on far-right extremism in Congress and the White House.

This is our last opportunity. Will you please send your support by chipping in any amount before the clock strikes midnight tonight?

Here’s a link to donate: secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-dec24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-dec24?amount=]

Thank you.

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjibqlblqd0gjgn4cajt00tdc3r5vduk880k2um8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth64o32cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr27n7r9gh8u3jf09ql80hsssql761ltkstdsfho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth64o32cdh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

name: Diane Sare
subject: 2025: The Year of LaRouche – Time to Stand Up
body:
Helga Zepp-LaRouche put forward the marching orders to be initiated immediately

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241231_the_year_of_larouche&n=1)
---
| Friend – Let's make it a Happy New Century! On December 30th, Helga Zepp-LaRouche put forward the marching orders to be initiated immediately:
1. Destroy the Anglo-Dutch so-called “Deep State” which put Lyndon LaRouche and many of his associates in prison, and which is now trying to block Trump’s nominees for Director of Intelligence, and the FBI, Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel.
2. Join the mobilization of Doctors Against Genocide who will be in Congress January 8 and 9th lobbying to end the slaughter in Gaza, and the illegal Israeli assault on Palestinian hospitals and health care workers, of whom over 1000 have been killed.
3. Invoke the “Year of Jubilee” declared by Pope Francis, to be observed by men and women of good will of all faiths and denominations, as a time to end “odious debt,” which stifles the potential for the growth and development of mankind.

The recent letter of the one hundred-year-old former FBI and CIA Director William Webster to members of the U.S. Senate, urging them to block the nominations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel, is yet another indicator that the criminal beneficiaries of the state of perpetual war and dictatorship fear that their reign may be ending. Long-time associates and supporters of Lyndon LaRouche will remember “Bill” Webster for his collusion with former Secretary of State Henry Kissinger to “do something about the LaRouche people,” over 40 years ago, in 1982. Henry Kissinger’s greatest fear was that LaRouche would still be on the scene when the inevitable collapse of the bankrupt British Liberal System occurred, and that LaRouche’s proposals for a new system, now elaborated by his widow Helga Zepp-LaRouche as her [**“Ten Principles for a New International Security and Development Architecture”**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW9n-wG8kxHkUJuWYWqXBAhbkqHnvIFs_CsYAwXSx3mNXxX3-O5hCpMLoKkb2nDMmXhOpoTYWk3YgRV8NSuwPjkG8mrHt_s-4JZSIXV6b2QM9YPgZw41FMxSquwblP6DmDk&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241231_the_year_of_larouche&n=2) could shape a new paradigm, free from colonial oppression. It should be clear from the defeat of Kamala Harris (aka Dick Cheney) in the recent U.S. presidential elections and the collapsing European governments, that the majority of humanity rejects the policy of perpetual war and dictatorship, and the potential exists for mankind to progress to a more ennobled state. However, this is by no means guaranteed, and as I wrote in my “[Four Weeks of Christmas](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oIHokKgZxT5kc4KQvMdTjAGH4M6aprs0CS7zs-vbl9P4PwbrepixnKjg3z4_DePHDNOk95TN0RUtbS9TKlGueyT53HF_-uujuCGt_LKog0oVyeLFXotkU-EnJeC3SUe9C&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241231_the_year_of_larouche&n=3)” statement, the owners of the collapsing system are prepared to unleash horrific crimes against humanity, as seen in Gaza, or even thermo-nuclear war. It cannot be ruled out that assassinations and terror disruptions may be employed by these degenerate and evil people to try to bring the rest of us into line. Therefore, I am inviting you to join the LaRouche Organization in fighting to finally liberate ourselves from the British Empire both in spirit and in practice! Support our work by making a regular monthly donation of any amount. | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241231_the_year_of_larouche&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241231_the_year_of_larouche&n=4)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo4qelfjjat82mbtr8bu4ckng0thri8aqvis01vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth6aor2c1h2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z73ouqfamr5m9ri5vdir2b228vddrrqno84oanug_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth6aor2c1h2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze3c13f7u9um6t4ho9vl6f24lunsifo4afc4dapo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth6aor2c1h2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

Happy New Year to All!
We may not have the new leadership we had hoped for, but we have the strength and courage of one another.
I look forward to 2025, with all of its joys and challenges.
May God Bless each of you as you bring in the New Year.
--Paula Collins
Candidate for Congress, NY-21
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Celebrating victory and the New Year!
body:
Happy New Year from Tea Party Patriots Action!
| | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** As the year draws to a close, there's a sense of joy and relief in the air, knowing that America is poised to move in a new direction with the upcoming inauguration of Donald Trump as the 47th President of the United States. We will all be welcoming the New Year with _real_ enthusiasm! **I want to reiterate that your efforts over the last four years, and especially in 2024, were instrumental in guiding our country to victory.** You were the driving force behind our ability to protect our republic. In the new year, we will have work to do to help President Trump implement the agenda he promised. I know that when we rise up and work together, we can accomplish our goals. Rest, but get ready to make America great again! From the bottom of my heart, thank you, and I wish you a very Happy New Year! Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************

name: Grover Norquist
subject: a personal favor
body:
We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsrvistp0fbpe11bghr0u8v7p0kgkdnvh8s6u6to_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)
Friend,

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack.

As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations.

**Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute.**

The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone.

[I am personally helping the Goldwater Institute raise $50,000 this month. Your support is critical for us to continue our success in scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast and empowering all Americans to live freer, happier lives. Can you join me by donating today? Click here to donate >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze7ltusm8gehn32gf66ate1m3ilb0bdjcak5em68_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights.

From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country.

As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. **_The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen_.**

But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help:
1. **Defend Individual Liberties:** By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights.
2. **Promote Economic Freedom:** Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment.
3. **Expand School Choice:** Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status.
4. **Protect Healthcare Freedom:** Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families.

[I urge you to join me in supporting the Goldwater Institute by making a generous donation today. Your investment in this vital work will help secure a future where freedom, opportunity, and prosperity flourish for all Americans.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8jc4vspu7g9lr17p9asl6ubf1kj0nrepgm16nho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj02q1fao0l9m855srt10m9r0ncs4hpikjaiorog_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgahrk7vdi9m07plr1ql85f4qfb63a358u8n9fvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbltobcp0gpl6rdf6gsnmhts6kdgqctf00es031o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf04k62364qtmveth3plu3deolqlokjmtt9av278_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmu7ct18g6vk07qdhntbgtavpkusthjo9b7rlal0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb136567vuaaaoboqc2npv5mnd9b5nchq44mli1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cth69oj2c5h2bs)
Thank you for your commitment to our shared principles.

Sincerely,

Grover Norquist

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

subject: Our goose is COOKED!

body:
2X MATCH to hit our goal. LAST CHANCE!

|
---
| | |
