name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4b0iv1dvru5srgmcr5bvj6b2npnsf64e88a56jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znt79dcq2l4qpg0i7fnfeaf55tuhq52af54e95qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztvvq37he9modg1is4i6jcrhcelrkvhju3o3dfho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6mo9ipar256khlerbkuj91kajs9lci7qq5qmhdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf7clclg57l2v1ca2mftphure4n8q5h7hg2fb1po_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj61pj6c5gm48d245p25oh4ctj6apr6c1i60ob24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl7qumnirji55sb0mh8pu70qg0csd1rr5c7bshro_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze7u5s273kvdbta0vdhtnlohgf9b5mp3rlk9emd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj60p30c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Fox News Contributor Says Harris’ Only Prayer Of Political Comeback Is
Weak ‘Democratic Bench’

Fox News contributor Tammy Bruce said Tuesday that only a weak “bench”

name: Grover Norquist
subject: a personal favor
body:
We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3bffdjf73hu6a7hk3oof2vbb78tp7k1qirh2vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)
Friend,

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack.

As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations.

**Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute.**

The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone.

[I am personally helping the Goldwater Institute raise $50,000 this month. Your support is critical for us to continue our success in scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast and empowering all Americans to live freer, happier lives. Can you join me by donating today? Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrjgnpjucqi9207k0o26n91sptfpk4ru89v9ra8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights.

From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country.

As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. **_The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen_.**

But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help:
1. **Defend Individual Liberties:** By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights.
2. **Promote Economic Freedom:** Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment.
3. **Expand School Choice:** Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status.
4. **Protect Healthcare Freedom:** Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families.

[I urge you to join me in supporting the Goldwater Institute by making a generous donation today. Your investment in this vital work will help secure a future where freedom, opportunity, and prosperity flourish for all Americans.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zknd6nck0iau7ipjq32poak44p5r1juie634j6b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zff7armgmie86g99qnbcvkg3m98ru4gck3h8nn68_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs95kpqct0cur41jgfo92gd63nbutg31ghq5pboo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmf8hbgdqlt6k5rlo630f91iau8upbt1fghihfbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z70c4tiqnb3evhohtju382ltk7u5egfggm43nu00_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjn4o451qhtta8n68ekjpupr2bo9qpq8t2jm22dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6r7nsg45c6kmeegdm28fc65mpkhvuv2lr3hrc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj64o76c5h2bs)
Thank you for your commitment to our shared principles.

Sincerely,

Grover Norquist

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Grover Norquist
subject: a personal favor
body:
We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdhc5amejqo3e06i871o4sesno4bgbtp29fp8t00_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)
Friend,

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack.

As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations.

**Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute.**

The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone.

[I am personally helping the Goldwater Institute raise $50,000 this month. Your support is critical for us to continue our success in scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast and empowering all Americans to live freer, happier lives. Can you join me by donating today? Click here to donate >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmqjacvcjrref6r32tlj8l2rs1vu429ebefd15vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights.

From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country.

As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. **_The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen_.**

But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help:
1. **Defend Individual Liberties:** By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights.
2. **Promote Economic Freedom:** Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment.
3. **Expand School Choice:** Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status.
4. **Protect Healthcare Freedom:** Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families.

[I urge you to join me in supporting the Goldwater Institute by making a generous donation today. Your investment in this vital work will help secure a future where freedom, opportunity, and prosperity flourish for all Americans.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z46man9gkqsusl531psqun8tj1r9jc86vsqnp44g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3qbs23g4puhv0rq4jvqb9suqnr7prkokk3cdpso_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh44ri8tt1cphne1aah67coov9s16gucorqk74qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq2lp9k4tdqpou2qc95uaanspopls4g5pl7p2dgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpk8iudjocfhj9vvqsgeq3239q5ik90qe9prrl08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zphoovp21dfdf52j61lfv5qaero4rias7pc7cog0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ijprumo46l9gphlsfb4shj4cdhomds0dd42m0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5ctj6cpr4c9h2bs)
Thank you for your commitment to our shared principles.

Sincerely,

Grover Norquist

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: A Blessed New Year Filled with His Grace
body:
As we bid farewell to this year and look forward to the promise of a new one, we want to take a moment to wish you a blessed and joyful New Year. Reflecting on the past months, we are reminded of God’s unending faithfulness and how His grace has carried us through every season.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVnmm44h4VLW7hK7lL2n_Dh1W2K0rfL5qhg5GN3JhCFP3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3ptVldB0R4q505qW5784Mr4ZPBdYW24zFpW2Y34TnW3yGQSt1p7dswW3jKBH87f4YfRW6hMCFn1BB2RwW8hxJTp8TMNHyW5zGQ7_7gk2pDW2Zxp1F7MhPgkN5wRNcg40FlSVjTmk-15-QVWVbSMHc80fmlyW64fNcG7c0tZHVltrzw4CrwvMN23WZ9QH13bdMkNWwfD9-NhVBBRsz7NBTWVVcWPN34cbytqW6XWTnb3gN1WdW87DDd828S2cFf1Zf2p204)
---
Dear Peter, As we close out 2024 and step into the promise of 2025, we are reminded of God’s unchanging faithfulness. His grace has carried us through every season, and His mercies are renewed each day. Lamentations 3:22-23 reminds us, “The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; His mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning; great is Your faithfulness.” With this assurance, we can go into the New Year with hope and confidence!
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVnmm44h4VLW7hK7lL2n_Dh1W2K0rfL5qhg5GN3JhCFP3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3prW2f9PqG9d6xSTW931qn22y_TFLW3pnJPf93QHWXW8vHJYb5MgXVhW5m77Xk5nB6s7W82Z0_N4kJsKtN4V7XgJnRjlgW4Ph6nH9lDvP8W75ZG_C3ksLh6W22z_f-1xcr0wW5-jYQb5qr_2sN5Rk7TYZ-ll0W2cllf65-tc_GW7gZ9SX41crw2W37p2197HqvqTW2wK06z139Dp6W732XCM8p6n84W43n3bc6b1bRgMngS6941kC5W6j6t8j3_lVlDdPXng404)
---
In 2024, we are thankful that you put your faith into action alongside us. Our prayer for 2025 is that we continue engaging, empowering, and equipping the body of Christ. May His love light your path and His peace guide your steps as we embrace all He has in store in the New Year. With prayers for a joyful and blessed New Year, TPUSA Faith
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Thank you for a successful 2024

| | | Happy New Year, Peter!

I’m incredibly proud of what we accomplished together in 2024. Thanks to your hard work and support, we built a momentous grassroots movement and earned a hard-fought victory.

As your Congressman-elect, I’m ready to fight for conservative values in Washington. Together, we’ll protect our way of life, stand up for our freedoms, and ensure that the America First voice is heard loud and clear in the halls of Congress.

From my family to yours, wishing you a happy and prosperous New Year!

Thank you,

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU_L2zAMhz-Nc0uQ7aRJDj4U8hYGe7tBDzsG1XZSgf8ROx379qMlO-z2XiXxe_RIvz7nTyRHYb2it4pynrc8B5wf5FyNps4FS5337TkLEF0NvAY-88qoTvBhGSqreC-7XsJwguqh9J3fwQyIQztqzUctlrHtT_JutdRjCxWpVw5w4Bx438pmGe-96ZYW-wGHZZCshT0ZLLahkMnYrGNMKToqpHMTt7Vy6lFKykyembgwcaGwxOa1bzbobGPNzsQFjadAuWxY6GnfGvbtYf8wecmayQmgh-4KohXf4Tz9mD4-bkyc9uLnHPdNWyantMWcrC4U1qPlraHdMzlZj-SOokafkNbA5PQ_9409qMdoDMWGwuT081x_u93qf-eoNmXSb3KO8qlnLayv_EZHX5Wvv-WpxN8AAAD__15hmJc)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU_L2zAMhz-Nc0uQ7aRJDj4U8hYGe7tBDzsG1XZSgf8ROx379qMlO-z2XiXxe_RIvz7nTyRHYb2it4pynrc8B5wf5FyNps4FS5337TkLEF0NvAY-88qoTvBhGSqreC-7XsJwguqh9J3fwQyIQztqzUctlrHtT_JutdRjCxWpVw5w4Bx438pmGe-96ZYW-wGHZZCshT0ZLLahkMnYrGNMKToqpHMTt7Vy6lFKykyembgwcaGwxOa1bzbobGPNzsQFjadAuWxY6GnfGvbtYf8wecmayQmgh-4KohXf4Tz9mD4-bkyc9uLnHPdNWyantMWcrC4U1qPlraHdMzlZj-SOokafkNbA5PQ_9409qMdoDMWGwuT081x_u93qf-eoNmXSb3KO8qlnLayv_EZHX5Wvv-WpxN8AAAD__15hmJc).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU_L2zAMhz-Nc0uQ7aRJDj4U8hYGe7tBDzsG1XZSgf8ROx379qMlO-z2XiXxe_RIvz7nTyRHYb2it4pynrc8B5wf5FyNps4FS5337TkLEF0NvAY-88qoTvBhGSqreC-7XsJwguqh9J3fwQyIQztqzUctlrHtT_JutdRjCxWpVw5w4Bx438pmGe-96ZYW-wGHZZCshT0ZLLahkMnYrGNMKToqpHMTt7Vy6lFKykyembgwcaGwxOa1bzbobGPNzsQFjadAuWxY6GnfGvbtYf8wecmayQmgh-4KohXf4Tz9mD4-bkyc9uLnHPdNWyantMWcrC4U1qPlraHdMzlZj-SOokafkNbA5PQ_9409qMdoDMWGwuT081x_u93qf-eoNmXSb3KO8qlnLayv_EZHX5Wvv-WpxN8AAAD__15hmJc)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU_L2zAMhz-Nc0uQ7aRJDj4U8hYGe7tBDzsG1XZSgf8ROx379qMlO-z2XiXxe_RIvz7nTyRHYb2it4pynrc8B5wf5FyNps4FS5337TkLEF0NvAY-88qoTvBhGSqreC-7XsJwguqh9J3fwQyIQztqzUctlrHtT_JutdRjCxWpVw5w4Bx438pmGe-96ZYW-wGHZZCshT0ZLLahkMnYrGNMKToqpHMTt7Vy6lFKykyembgwcaGwxOa1bzbobGPNzsQFjadAuWxY6GnfGvbtYf8wecmayQmgh-4KohXf4Tz9mD4-bkyc9uLnHPdNWyantMWcrC4U1qPlraHdMzlZj-SOokafkNbA5PQ_9409qMdoDMWGwuT081x_u93qf-eoNmXSb3KO8qlnLayv_EZHX5Wvv-WpxN8AAAD__15hmJc)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLtu7CAURb8Gd4x4GIMLiiuNLN1ikiJFSgvzmDkSNhYHT34_cqopUqRea69if97mm4MM2_3NrdEC4lxx3tz8gJypCxSbaxSP-pwFE4oyThmfeResEtwk00XLtVRaMjOw7mGDW0xkahA8-mBkFMl45uOoRz-qJaoO7NlhnHHOuO7lJY2LDir1ThtnkpGkZ8ceXIsX2BBCRF_KvpcMDTxeSr132T5a25HIf0RMRExlb-Vov-q-rERMx4bHgr7CEs-FnBYir_9_dPpx-vQ9pViRiCESeQ37F-QMOGgiVM_uq4N8lrpqX9AraH8_7mnFdwAAAP__aZR4vw)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMz71uwyAUQOGngc3W5c-QgaFLtnTtiG4A21fCNjLEVd--yt6h-6cjna9HeCAV2pdP3LKn1sLZwo5hpVIGTEPr2If2Oq8gQZoBxAAiCJ68kcLNjmcvrDJWgZuAr95Gg1lZUPk2WdBJG6um5ySylTrpFDn5dwcECAHCajXOt6dNZtZoHbrZKabhVRP2PNLeKOUWj6PWo1Cn2MbjXHjxa--1MfXB5J3J-18uHhuT93rShfFnXPtW-OlT_aZSqE2WaVg2pPJ2vP9_-_LyNwAA__9JGGIJ)_

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C62vhzPNrejhdGsWOCgVTQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C62vhzPNrejhdGsWOCgVTQ~~/AARclAA~~~).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C62vhzPNrejhdGsWOCgVTQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C62vhzPNrejhdGsWOCgVTQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sYA9yvkYifB_WKf8aRflEw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpV7amP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdlHR51Z61CDHBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/a0XWr4ZTBVtjR6qsQLQIqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpV7amP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnZR0edWetQgxwUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d745b9d0ad34232949406f4c26961c0&_e=YLqb6GjSVR2_334lf4hscZD7GnTRN2Ebr_StjOxvPdsuVdf4wpJiWw1YHEwPHnNbu23CdAAaSQR2QpNtLKH4W00BbwZK8YTz3RrZJYnuGGGwwXo2Ulwcvtkax_L7y0-bfP9NQCEZDRuhLlIhpqGbGIshXOetRJsoMZeyMA2U-Ada4NW0jCQV-Gi4dTnVTMyC_MCmircl8pUyW4c76bBN6z4BxeKUtAiJQ-8_xCMQmIYPu7vBj2psMcAiOW-I2uLFP-z_iPpBAP3rL-bg2VkvMaL9v37V1hAoeC5u_vSlDHxNoHy3x74jTBAqbIzT0bjbPD2zDS77dXv8sEMhmOyfXsBi1xmVu5PE7V_ke2ghLYGtmLwUIDRIkbGaHKKfUamzK7ygKkja8r2thL-0yMHFqwYFhBOjoXDH2GCIAESy9t0%3D)**

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. | Friend, Happy New Year! We have some great news, and I couldn't wait to share it with you! 🎉

Because the work we're doing is so critical and the stakes are so high, one of our generous donors has agreed to extend the 4X matching gift offer for one more day. **That means you still have time to quadruple your impact and fuel the fight to protect the planet for future generations.**

This is a unique opportunity to be part of the movement that's leading the charge against the climate crisis and driving meaningful change at the federal and state levels.

Your support is more important than ever as we push forward with enduring policies and fight for every community impacted by climate change. **We can't afford to slow down, and with your help, we _won't_.**

name: Grover Norquist
subject: a personal favor
body:
We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d0ffc2e5a1e4a3dbf404a21496df101&_e=chEr5HziCwTYxcPMBlrK44qX5uSHdS64hyYXXxW-nIabhEO_ntbncOiUk39AaGQG4r5NcJPRNFrBzIvNZy1gvmdbu5J7540UslXNGOfOAKtekELI_8FtnQRO7I2vgzm1SRDDBtugBOEkuB6TsnZMPl3TcQQ2mShLrTYmO2R_gH-yqrOIs7AXkSoOxoyItmax6Wd0927Twu_jkf1lyPIGO_b2665EHdfWanQgZKjzYhGzp3EG9RbnXXaBwdyGX2o_0xMc9htVTSKJJk_tj83oi2H3b7pZ7phlrquFVqDdyjk%3D)
Friend,

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack.

As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations.

**Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute.**

The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone.

[I am personally helping the Goldwater Institute raise $50,000 this month. Your support is critical for us to continue our success in scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast and empowering all Americans to live freer, happier lives. Can you join me by donating today? Click here to donate >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d0ffc2e5a1e4a3dbf404a21496df101&_e=chEr5HziCwTYxcPMBlrK44qX5uSHdS64hyYXXxW-nIabhEO_ntbncOiUk39AaGQG4r5NcJPRNFrBzIvNZy1gvmdbu5J7540UslXNGOfOAKtekELI_8FtnQRO7I2vgzm1SRDDBtugBOEkuB6TsnZMPiFNMvaBMtTPym88E5cfUk6XErqLu1WVgjmtBwR7A-PxWpVeK_iWTABgzbZhIPYV1a4PmRNNtbsmnvBiWUytQR_Y2qxHIdTvY8trsmDy7OB10kTETdEYSWgTYLoK5XiRUjT4s_hHMWmioaXvlS1fwdM%3D)

The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights.

From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country.

As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. **_The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen_.**

But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help:
1. **Defend Individual Liberties:** By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights.
2. **Promote Economic Freedom:** Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment.
3. **Expand School Choice:** Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status.
4. **Protect Healthcare Freedom:** Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families.

[I urge you to join me in supporting the Goldwater Institute by making a generous donation today. clean_body: We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack. As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations. Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone. The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights. From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country. As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen. But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help: 1. Defend Individual Liberties: By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights. 2. Promote Economic Freedom: Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment. 3. Expand School Choice: Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status. 4. Protect Healthcare Freedom: Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families. Thank you for your commitment to our shared principles. Sincerely, Grover Norquist The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R7g1kr2qrZVoVLiEoh5a5A~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R7g1kr2qrZVoVLiEoh5a5A~~/AARclAA~).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R7g1kr2qrZVoVLiEoh5a5A~~/AARclAA~)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/R7g1kr2qrZVoVLiEoh5a5A~~/AARclAA~)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Cs5F_zPVNF6flye2t3FkoQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpV7myP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnZVIhdWe35E-iUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uqilMC76Y0ryWcnzSzM_fA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpV7myP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QubmV0L3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnZVIhdWe35E-iUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

clean_body: The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country. Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions. body:
Since The Texas Flyover launched last January, we've grown to nearly 250,000 readers, delivering straightforward, hard-hitting news to start each day.

| | |

# Wednesday, January 1, 2025
---|---
**Happy New Year!** On this day in 1925, Governor Pat M. Neff appointed an [all-woman state Supreme Court](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GugyAUxvGngU3DASk4MNzFrXe9oznCqZKgNEhqffsbu3f6T98v-f7u4x1jitv8iyu5-n7kUQqpGwGNgDFgTOfY8eAmEXrg5MAobRSANnxxJmCvyfvphtZI22kjegvB2t4qL43n0V2YAAEACsC2U-hIKkANSoP2nnWCQqy5tHWhSm_cH-nMLyqtzytPbqn1uTP1w-TA5HAcR1v3BfOW4kZtLjOTw2fVBDyb6bzC5EBbLVetsry48DxiSnG_GdaJecWYPnj9-vbl5H8AAAD__wRwVkM) to adjudicate a case involving the Woodmen of the World, an organization to which all three sitting justices belonged. The Baylor Bears lost to the LSU Tigers 44-31 in the [Texas Bowl yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0jz1vwyAUAH8NbLZ4DzDuwNAFqUO6drT4eLaRcLBsFCf_vkr3zifd6X5u083nku_Lt9_ItudcJxSoOwGdgCn5XF6T4skGkT6AkwUjtZEA2vDVagphpAAQ5gHnGEYBSievlDERgBTP9i0TIABAAox9SIpQgtcgNegYmRKUcqtH31Zq9PTnXF71QUcf68aLXVvbTyY_GTqG7rquns79_oYMXayl0ELdXGsLvhSG7qDod4ZuYugWv9FXYuiUgMEYEIofNu1XLiWfg2FKLJvP5a_U_l1_WPwNAAD__5jVWYw), battling back to within 10 points after falling behind 28-7 in the second quarter. Later today, the Texas Longhorns will take on the Arizona State Sun Devils [in the Peach Bowl](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D_vmzAQxvFXA9tFPhvDr4OHLmzp2hEd_gNWLza1HZL01VfJWKn7o4_0fH9elytFjmn7QTdv2jPkRQqpQSAIXBxFfi1D78wq3DfsvcFJ6Ukh6qnfjSatvSIl7LpOKlAYhbYqDG4c6Sug7KN5YwIFIirEr8vqBi8VkkalUVvbDcK72HK5tN03_6Qa-JVPXy4233o2e2tH7dT3Ts6dnKntnFM9cmn1PejkbDOz3zyEnNtKzJ2cD092hzU_GD4icE7bnkuqcFagEv_kRFAbNQ_1nsD5M3KFfyU4mF45BPh9p9J8CTERw1G8i7bFnOCI9lcFKeTQF-OOR2SOdZy6QWw3ivx50P6b9DTybwAAAP__r7t-kg) for a spot in the College Football Playoff Semifinal at AT&T Stadium next Friday. Today's edition highlights the top stories of 2024, and tomorrow's edition will be a little shorter than usual as our team members enjoy the holiday with their families. We'll return to the normal format on Friday. Today's sponsor is [FinanceBuzz](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kbmOpDAQhp_GZG5RNscQEIwWEe2MNtsQFXYZSm0O2WaOfvoVrW5pk0n9_f7q-vs2vCF7Xqd3XKhNX24bVK5KmYPMYbDI_nsoMtuOuW0goxZqXdYaoKyzudVN81KXhcmtKcAguqJqnHbGurqyqmoybk9ZDjkAaICXy2gLUhqwBF1CaYwocrKctnBJMyX6wuj89_ZB4WK2JfPtnNIehX4Vqheqd7ziamg8breTC9V7XC2vkzTh1EiDwcqEV5Iox0B4lS5si5x5miWviQLFJO-5OMsRzVXo_kjLELcjGBK6SzM9GpBuvAlVnXQhy8cidLcjW7nSZ_SUEgUZ4iORKJw8bM8Hg8uOPK1Cdx1Hcxf2r7__CFWhncJ27GyF7t5_yWe5_yaI0j7_wAWy0Nr9k73nWNWiyKcF2d_Xk36810er_gUAAP__p9KdcQ), which is offering a rare unlimited cashback match on its credit cards.

## Top Stories of 2024
Since _The Texas Flyover_ launched last January, we've grown to nearly 250,000 readers, delivering straightforward, hard-hitting news to start each day. In today's edition, we've compiled some of this year's most-clicked stories, covering the biggest events in Texas over the past 12 months, including the total solar eclipse, Hurricane Beryl, and the [inaugural MICHELIN Texas Guide](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAMhp9G3mSQknV0Mmjo4i1dOxq60DYB2Q4kJU3evkjQTkU3Avz-C_6P83T2nHlf3v1Grt3nY1KgjASUgFPynB_T0CUXIJ2wI4dWG6sRje1Wp4P3yppgINmTmdUQhzD7EwCAtojUsXuaAQIiasT_fUgDKY3eoDZoYhQDUOJ2lL6t1Oju65wfx41KH4-ty25t7VKFfhNqFGpcrpyo3ziulHl_IkKN1yrUSLtQoy-NYyahxh9EvhQyUqHt2B-_P69IWZsvVS6FaP--Awe5HNey-T11xaXLJ-fM9Z8VAyyb5_zq1_4c7ObUVwAAAP__sK5vsg). However, nothing came close to topping the clicks on the August 23 story about the [90-foot Lord Hanuman statue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb_GdFgMmBAXFK9Jl9duaY1hbKPFcQSzIfn7VdJvf-85Ol_X6Yopp9v6H3fy_FyOSSttpQKpYIqY8msaRPSziiMI8uCMdQbAOrF560Kw5zAGh8uicQaKkYI-G6viGA2I5N8wBQoADMC5n-NA2gBaMBZsCN2gKCY-Ss8bMT2xLvl1PKj04dhF9hvzvXbmX6cvnb601vobtdqIvt-DTl8-H7kSV8lbKlFmLCtVlpWRf0jiTiUFlDAO2pycKD7eW8o51ZPrBrXumPLHxX_GP7z-DQAA__9yH10r) installed at a Hindu temple in Sugar Land. Please enjoy this compilation of the year's top stories, and we hope you'll continue to start your day with us in the new year.
## Vehicle Safety Inspections Eliminated
Thanks to a state law passed in 2023, safety inspections are [no longer required](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHvpCAUxD8NdhgeiKwFxTV2e-2VBuG5vgTBCFl2v_3Fq675d5OZyWTy-_Ncno4ipddvd6Ctny0vUkjNBXABS3AUv8vQBbuKMEGHFozSRgFo0-0WnEO1rY_RTx5RKG00yHEy3gUcpgE6sveYAAEACuDRr2FAqcBpUBq092wQGKjmq687Vvy4ssVvfuPV-3x00e61noWpX0zOTM6ttT6tPmztjpmcE7bC5HzmSJX8LWNOyEt1F__PTNh4dI1jpIOSq1j4kUvlb9zJR-SUyom-Uk53Wxn5GMXI5NxdNpyNYqQyGjaI1-Eo_ntWf0T1tvJvAAAA__9n-WyX) for renewing the registration of non-commercial vehicles in Texas. However, drivers in 17 highly populated counties--Bexar County will be added in 2026--must still pass an emissions test if they don't drive an electric vehicle. [House Bill 3297](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFv8jAQxvFP42xEvjsbJ4OHF6GIAd6hHTpGxj6CVVNHsUvJt69g7_7T80j_j9N4cjHFr-m_u7Gtj0seUaLeSNhIGIOLaR1VE-xZhh4atmBIGwLQprlaCNArzwa2PZMi3Z29DwjBE16wY9lE-xyTIAGAALr2HBQjgdNAGrT3QkkOsealrVeu_HDlktZ856X1-dYke611LoL-CRwEDt7NsebUvmA75bvAYRdTOub8-T0LHA6x1LysrSvzQ9Bw5OmdSxG077o3gdunFbQ_7Ah70yw2zD8xpVi2Rig53VxMr9v6Z4e7xd8AAAD__z6NXh0) was backed by Tesla and advocates for reducing the size of government, while county sheriffs, the Dallas Police Association, and the Texas State Inspection Association tried to prevent its passage. To compensate for lost state revenue, [drivers will be assessed a $7.50 inspection program replacement fee](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9u6yAYxZ8Gb1h8YOxkYMjVlaemS4e0kwXms4OEwQISx29fOXunMxydP_rdrsNVO-_C_KkXVOU1xYEzLikDymCw2vl9aCqrDLNnqFBBJ2QnAGRX3ZU88dYaiUy2TKAxMDEDTXtqtOH2rE3l1FHGgAGAADjVxjbIBWgJQoIcR9IwtK7EVJc7FnzpPPk9PjHVY1wqr-6lrJmIC-E94f22bfWSw-ER3mOgj0x4rx8lHjpjwKQ94f2oE816wrJTF_KKY3ExZIrBujBTF-h76YgmernA9vHzfSOij6OzRPz_d9DALX9hWquk7Lo5711uO9KwedHOv7-VP2E9Ff8NAAD__8D4bNk) when they renew their vehicle's registration. Safety inspections are still required for commercial vehicles.

clean_body: Since The Texas Flyover launched last January, we've grown to nearly 250,000 readers, delivering straightforward, hard-hitting news to start each day. | | | | | | Wednesday, January 1, 2025 ---|--- Happy New Year! On this day in 1925, Governor Pat M. Neff appointed an to adjudicate a case involving the Woodmen of the World, an organization to which all three sitting justices belonged. The Baylor Bears lost to the LSU Tigers 44-31 in the , battling back to within 10 points after falling behind 28-7 in the second quarter. Later today, the Texas Longhorns will take on the Arizona State Sun Devils for a spot in the College Football Playoff Semifinal at AT&T Stadium next Friday. Today's edition highlights the top stories of 2024, and tomorrow's edition will be a little shorter than usual as our team members enjoy the holiday with their families. We'll return to the normal format on Friday. Today's sponsor is , which is offering a rare unlimited cashback match on its credit cards. In today's edition, we've compiled some of this year's most-clicked stories, covering the biggest events in Texas over the past 12 months, including the total solar eclipse, Hurricane Beryl, and the . However, nothing came close to topping the clicks on the August 23 story about the installed at a Hindu temple in Sugar Land. Please enjoy this compilation of the year's top stories, and we hope you'll continue to start your day with us in the new year. Vehicle Safety Inspections Eliminated Thanks to a state law passed in 2023, safety inspections are for renewing the registration of non-commercial vehicles in Texas. However, drivers in 17 highly populated counties--Bexar County will be added in 2026--must still pass an emissions test if they don't drive an electric vehicle. was backed by Tesla and advocates for reducing the size of government, while county sheriffs, the Dallas Police Association, and the Texas State Inspection Association tried to prevent its passage. To compensate for lost state revenue, when they renew their vehicle's registration. Safety inspections are still required for commercial vehicles. | Flying together with our sponsor If you have outstanding credit card debt, getting a could help ease the pressure while you pay down your balances. That's up to 10% back on qualifying purchases! . | These events are among this year's most-clicked stories and cover some of the biggest happenings in Texas since we launched last January. ➤ April 10: Texans and visitors from all over the world experienced a spectacular solar eclipse. This photo from the International Space Station provided a unique perspective of the rare phenomenon. () ➤ April 18: Nearly 50 public water systems across the state reported exceeding federal limits for one or more of five "forever chemicals" identified by the Environmental Protection Agency. () ➤ July 11: Hurricane Beryl killed dozens of people in Southeast Texas, caused billions in damages, and knocked out power to parts of Houston for over a week. Before the storm hit, a Texas City H-E-B started selling hurricane-themed cakes. Photos of the desserts went viral on social media. () ➤ Aug. 9: Tracy Travers of Quinlin continued his tradition of walking his daughters to school on the first day of class in a crazy outfit. This year, he was inspired by the 1980s. () ➤ Aug. 19: A six-home, 24-acre compound in Spring hit the market for $15 million. The massive estate was previously the residence of a local megachurch founder. () ➤ Sept. 20: A truck carrying chicken renderings and alligator parts spilled its load on I-635 in Balch Springs, shutting down the highway for hours. () ➤ Sept. 30: A Rednecks with Paychecks off-road event in Montague County turned violent when a monster truck driver ran over multiple people in a drunken rage. () ➤ Oct. 14: A Houston couple decorated their house for Halloween by building a 40-foot pirate ship in their front yard. () ➤ Nov. 16: The inaugural MICHELIN Guide Texas included 15 restaurants awarded one star and over 40 that received the Bib Gourmand recognition. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb7a1a7f-43cb-4520-a27d-6e0bb5ef6957/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Happy New Year!** On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln signed [the Emancipation Proclamation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GujE8QJgpKLaxm223NE_A8W0QDJIx_v3G6be7J7k5xfl5jk-kRPn1jWt0bS6jFLK_CbgJGANSOkfNg5tjlFHx6MCq3ipQxvDFaWWDt_Dwxsw-TL0CtHryslcThtkAJ3fZBAgAUEb0ne7hLqfHrPRdPazVTIsYqJXa_RbKbYlzOss71s6XlSe3tLbtTH0xOTA5HMfR4RorecwL7a3U08fcKqbrzuRwAcX9WitmTxs2Kvm21eITrh9gcuDVhe2glGg3lmnxWpE-Bt7-C_B28i8AAP__T9pexg), declaring, _" I never, in my life, felt more certain that I was doing right than I do in signing this paper." _ Happy New Year to our _Flyover_ readers! This year also saw the debut of _Feel Good Friday_ as a standalone weekly publication, along with new special sections and features designed to engage our growing audience of over 1 million readers. What were you reading? Our data shows that political and election news, sports, and curated lists--covering everything from taxes to food and the best small towns across the U.S.--were among the most popular topics. Animal content also captured significant attention, with videos of baby penguins and a Colorado rattlesnake den drawing thousands of views. Below, you'll find some of the year's most-clicked stories. As always, we welcome your feedback and suggestions to help _The Flyover_ continue to grow and improve. Thank you for being part of our journey this year. Here's to an even better 2025!

clean_body: 2024 was an exciting year for The Flyover. | | | | | | Wednesday, January 1, 2025 ---|--- Happy New Year! On this day in 1863, President Abraham Lincoln signed , declaring, " I never, in my life, felt more certain that I was doing right than I do in signing this paper." Happy New Year to our Flyover readers! We have a special edition of The Flyover today, a shorter-than-usual issue as we celebrate the holiday. Our team has analyzed the data and identified the top stories of 2024, which you can find featured below. What was the most memorable story of 2024 for you? We'd love to hear your thoughts--just reply to this email! Start 2024 with a fresh perspective--sign up for our seven state editions: , , , , , , and --and stay in the know all year long! Today's sponsor is . Check out their products below. | The Flyover Reviews 2024 2024 was an exciting year for The Flyover. We started strong with the launch of and expanded with six . This year also saw the debut of Feel Good Friday as a standalone weekly publication, along with new special sections and features designed to engage our growing audience of over 1 million readers. What were you reading? Our data shows that political and election news, sports, and curated lists--covering everything from taxes to food and the best small towns across the U.S.--were among the most popular topics. Animal content also captured significant attention, with videos of baby penguins and a Colorado rattlesnake den drawing thousands of views. Below, you'll find some of the year's most-clicked stories. As always, we welcome your feedback and suggestions to help The Flyover continue to grow and improve. Thank you for being part of our journey this year. Here's to an even better 2025! College Football Playoffs Roll On The College Football Playoff Quarterfinals continue today after Penn State Boise State last night, 31-14, becoming the first team to advance to the semifinals. The with the Peach Bowl, featuring No. 5 Texas taking on No. 4 Arizona State in Atlanta. Next, the Rose Bowl brings a highly anticipated rematch as No. 8 Ohio State faces No. 1 Oregon. The day's final game is the Sugar Bowl, where No. 7 Notre Dame squares off against No. 2 Georgia. The semifinal round is set for next week, with quarterfinal winners advancing to either the Orange Bowl on Jan. 9 or the Cotton Bowl on Jan. 10. name: Grover Norquist
subject: a personal favor
body:
We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36c067ec9eec48719aa4ef34b911ad5c&_e=Qb8i-UrRGdZwo3zREWRMG6RiOHR3ftYrLfLoKM0T0sav_OLjujOe7NWan4SnYazodO2I3Qz6SA-xQseSn-0Pac5qJjd6ovcl96xGuEwxZ33fz4NCk-DtJ5kXH7n8_Ml3bQ2PgVcKwHzjIWF9tejxzDrsk4LyZlqUTX9nlxDt5HtQkzMqT_RD0t8p8Yqu81do78pDtiAijHxr39ck8BgmhSfW0826yZlUpEIUvMV19NPHJdQkb7Nr8SD-poue0DPyU32yU0MId1WFT6kZvwwOzK9IqebZiXN44FGk02-c9Ec%3D)
Friend,

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack.

As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations.

**Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute.**

The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone.

[I am personally helping the Goldwater Institute raise $50,000 this month. Your support is critical for us to continue our success in scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast and empowering all Americans to live freer, happier lives. Can you join me by donating today? Click here to donate >>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36c067ec9eec48719aa4ef34b911ad5c&_e=Qb8i-UrRGdZwo3zREWRMG6RiOHR3ftYrLfLoKM0T0sav_OLjujOe7NWan4SnYazodO2I3Qz6SA-xQseSn-0Pac5qJjd6ovcl96xGuEwxZ33fz4NCk-DtJ5kXH7n8_Ml3bQ2PgVcKwHzjIWF9tejxzFGo0Pv3-65VyGve8TES6jSmYnhr4ur6XANP42_e9zMxhfPNc1M9rBXONPsXMssJzDVXGwBE4bTSli4d83UY-HpYeq72B8zBatXh61rSZhL8dwsSzhfK5MrI46ubRdgH8AWW2f11Vjx35Q0vjKME-kw%3D)

The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights.

From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country.

As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. **_The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen_.**

But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help:
1. **Defend Individual Liberties:** By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights.
2. **Promote Economic Freedom:** Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment.
3. **Expand School Choice:** Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status.
4. **Protect Healthcare Freedom:** Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families.

[I urge you to join me in supporting the Goldwater Institute by making a generous donation today. clean_body: We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, We are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history. The values that have made America a beacon of freedom and prosperity are under relentless attack. As a steadfast advocate for limited government and individual liberty, I have had the honor of working alongside some of the nation's most dedicated and principled organizations. Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of one such organization that has consistently championed the values we hold dear: the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute is on the front lines of this battle, scoring real wins for freedom in state courts, legislatures, and communities nationwide. But they cannot do it alone. The Goldwater Institute is at the forefront of the fight to defend America’s founding values, crafting and promoting policy solutions that empower individuals, reduce government overreach, and safeguard our constitutional rights. From healthcare reform to educational choice, the Goldwater Institute's impact resonates across Arizona and the entire country. As a board member, I have witnessed firsthand the incredible work the Goldwater Institute does. Their commitment to free-market principles and limited government is unwavering. The Goldwater Institute is not just talking about change; they are making it happen. But to continue their critical work, they need the support of dedicated patriots like you. Your contribution to the Goldwater Institute will help: 1. Defend Individual Liberties: By challenging unconstitutional laws that infringe on our rights. 2. Promote Economic Freedom: Through policies that reduce the tax burden, eliminate unnecessary regulations, and foster a thriving business environment. 3. Expand School Choice: Ensuring that every child has access to the best possible education, regardless of their zip code or economic status. 4. Protect Healthcare Freedom: Advocating for patient-centered reforms that put control back into the hands of individuals and families. Thank you for your commitment to our shared principles. Sincerely, Grover Norquist The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbe5b4323a5645669cd11fb34caed532&_e=DJWR20gocA82IO02ejc_qHYgEhVKxp10YdyywRL4OU5hZY0-Yvzp6VQ8Je-fwxJ0Jje1EF7fiEOM0R1YXsYdFSxe_1Vc0j7Q5AQHYMAvC00-6yUnl3RUYgHaO1vkErD9WdIHUJQRqDpUnCWMCykB2fIB1dPfWSrEsR0uRrdlmRlqdGUvA145JlpQFD1HUEZi-rvnBmmVZx2qE9C0vYAT2OG1xhrwhiKlv8En8HiKIdrDrbejUJHXZL6L12WKprjmlmpokHK6nmEpgmk-MdsgA-7FUcZcD_tJ8CvuKZPEVB8-XTzTAAyPwjHX4NWG5408ZZxiX_rBgk6Rr7JVkuez5WaXV09-1kjWzIVmF4BcVWdidkKi4rrvZsX1jxc6Dgi7-5sByI1iuk63oW47p4dB_BQ13jd8ON2H1OjAE3-bAT0%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbe5b4323a5645669cd11fb34caed532&_e=DJWR20gocA82IO02ejc_qHYgEhVKxp10YdyywRL4OU5hZY0-Yvzp6VQ8Je-fwxJ0Jje1EF7fiEOM0R1YXsYdFSxe_1Vc0j7Q5AQHYMAvC00-6yUnl3RUYgHaO1vkErD9WdIHUJQRqDpUnCWMCykB2fIB1dPfWSrEsR0uRrdlmRlqdGUvA145JlpQFD1HUEZi-rvnBmmVZx2qE9C0vYAT2OG1xhrwhiKlv8En8HiKIdrDrbejUJHXZL6L12WKprjmdU_epB_96kA7-okI5xQBp4zux7IPYLYcCAPRZMl7eXOgoLbCb9b9LRZ2YDn-wfjkOn26wZoHuoUsFL5dpq1SPKc7v2D0RClAooFZJTVt4lN4SgxVTJ-0iejIiOxsgVjuxe9uXWtrM6TUiNS6JTA9ZcT0N9ejJphg6ouhhM7rubA%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbe5b4323a5645669cd11fb34caed532&_e=DJWR20gocA82IO02ejc_qHYgEhVKxp10YdyywRL4OU5hZY0-Yvzp6VQ8Je-fwxJ0Jje1EF7fiEOM0R1YXsYdFSxe_1Vc0j7Q5AQHYMAvC00-6yUnl3RUYgHaO1vkErD9WdIHUJQRqDpUnCWMCykB2fIB1dPfWSrEsR0uRrdlmRlqdGUvA145JlpQFD1HUEZi-rvnBmmVZx2qE9C0vYAT2OG1xhrwhiKlv8En8HiKIdrDrbejUJHXZL6L12WKprjml9BrQ82Mcn-0ofO7DMcI9IsoV-HDwiJ7DFQkr4fAxyvP9cJpSFMl9ubqINVuOrAjIJ1f3IADGnzBk6viV5WYpxXhN3oUR_C4Ucw1DHrpCdV6NOx3nLSJHLlnfxsDHUiLlywZWqnyYGTvcRkzxCbmpaJKnuX0UF7bN1Frt7WwhRs%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbe5b4323a5645669cd11fb34caed532&_e=DJWR20gocA82IO02ejc_qHYgEhVKxp10YdyywRL4OU5hZY0-Yvzp6VQ8Je-fwxJ0Jje1EF7fiEOM0R1YXsYdFSxe_1Vc0j7Q5AQHYMAvC00-6yUnl3RUYgHaO1vkErD9WdIHUJQRqDpUnCWMCykB2fIB1dPfWSrEsR0uRrdlmRlqdGUvA145JlpQFD1HUEZi-rvnBmmVZx2qE9C0vYAT2OG1xhrwhiKlv8En8HiKIdrDrbejUJHXZL6L12WKprjmCRLojbYiychu4qZ8Uic_QDgdCUbRcAPLZpLuqy8N6vtO4zhc7AZ4yVd5K9jfR3qVOrfsAxgeTUCAQ7kdHA-LuacP3FgrXpTS8eWQEjn2_yt859edsgPSjThOfja6P-mWa7XYqzZt6686_1KQOETJXKSKKdNRNtLsTvCfkHzhIro%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=dbe5b4323a5645669cd11fb34caed532&_t=lFfEl_mftvU_Ug2XIkgUIYoJ8jdbzx6E3wdKphdL6V8N5pjlHE_j9eFVrJyGnooyKfvfq80VVj1xW0fwj3XpvDs6ET7eiZ8sx-d1T2GnBl3Z0U0f8mbmgLtdFkSY2vy9VsIdYG_oZRPsgUfjgFU-GipIhearXLyasG5mNoZxE6Q%3D)

name: History Facts
subject: How long have we been making New Year's resolutions?
body:
Perhaps because of the universally uplifting feeling of starting anew, you can find similarities between the lively New Year's celebrations found in many countries today and those of the oldest recorded civilizations. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cbl11m7po8gpbjmmyt0fkmlfnr33u4t0k4r3nbidopmo34d87iwhlelfhbip3hqjyh292awkbe49biivlam1n6dfptxudx865iv91zeobe3uqsr2ex2x10s4ntueiwk9tdqcjzh8hnbggxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The first New Year's resolutions may date back 4,000 years.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| P erhaps because of the universally uplifting feeling of starting anew, you can find similarities between the lively New Year's celebrations found in many countries today and those of the oldest recorded civilizations. The ancient Egyptians, for example, shared huge meals and partook in music and dancing to commemorate the pending flooding of the Nile with the festival of Wepet Renpet, meaning “opening of the year.” And the Babylonians of Mesopotamia enjoyed their own extended gala some 4,000 years ago with rituals that may have included a prototype of our modern-day New Year's resolutions.
---
Held in March to mark the start of the planting season, the 12-day Babylonian festival of [Akitu](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) —which began on the first new moon of spring — was a time to honor the supreme god Marduk, his son Nabu, and the other deities who watched over the people. For the king, this included a humbling ceremony in which he was stripped of his regalia, struck across the face, and dragged by the ears by the high priest to atone for any sins committed. It’s believed the rest of the common folk, spared of such physical punishment, instead engaged in prayer, [promising](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that they would repay their debts and otherwise conduct themselves in sterling fashion to please the gods.
While the Babylonians may have been the first to introduce these promises to a celebration marking the start of the year, the Romans were the first to deliver theirs in January. For that we can thank the wide-reaching Roman calendar, which moved the first month of the year from March to January. Named for the two-faced god Janus, who both looked back at the past and faced the unknown future, the first month became a time for officials to pledge their vows of loyalty to Rome — a custom that continues in the less urgent but no less earnest tradition of the countless people who pledge to get off the couch and hit the gym in the new year.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## "Auld Lang Syne" is one of the most frequently sung songs in English.
Well before anyone attempts to enact their ambitious resolutions, they often ring in the new year by singing — or at least humming along to — the cryptic but irresistibly catchy Scottish folk song "Auld Lang Syne." Based on works that date back to at least the 16th century, the "Auld Lang Syne" we know today is the result of Scottish poet Robert Burns capturing and rewriting lyrics he overheard from a man singing in the late 18th century. Set to its now-distinct melody by music publisher George Thomson, the song became a New Year's standard thanks to a 1929 radio performance by Guy Lombardo and His Royal Canadians. But the nostalgic tune has long since found its way into other occasions, including British political ceremonies, international Scout Movement events, and graduations in the U.S. and Asia. Its popularity boosted by appearances in such famous films as _It's a Wonderful Life_ (1946) and _When Harry Met Sally..._ (1989), "Auld Lang Syne" has earned a [spot](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spes62&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in Guinness World Records as one of the three most frequently sung songs in English, along with "Happy Birthday to You" and "For He's a Jolly Good Fellow."
