| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/05cbf155-54d9-44ec-882d-9dc1b7091a81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Stephanie McCabe](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f6ed3787-f909-40b3-8eb1-cfa1da71e927?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ae3f2d5c-ffd8-4cfd-a578-e404d66f61fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2024 was a very strange year. The year ended with our country, our world and the medical profession in a very dangerous place.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..8nYMf4ItqTJm5zP38Zi44G8u3mXBPe4D4ToYj86TfRg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153869771)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=153869771&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzODY5NzcxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU3NTY5MzcsImV4cCI6MTczODM0ODkzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HDbVfG3azE4bLqXhCN7OFW1ut9Hk0q42_1XHbTIBz3M)
There are signs of hope in our country more meaningful change is needed. American Pride must be restored in our constitutional republic. An end must come to the powers at be that rule with their money, power and the media mob that they use for their own personal, political and pecuniary benefit (on both sides of the political aisle).
**What Does a Congressional Campaign Reveal about our Electorate?**
During my Congressional campaign, I found that many people are totally unaware of what is happening. _**Our best defense is an educated electorate and that is hard to come by**_. Most people wake up in the morning, send their kids off to school, go to work, come home, eat dinner, watch some tv and go to bed for another day of rinse and repeat. I still meet people who did not know I was running but voted for me because they voted across the line.
As for the average American, if their life is ok, and there is something leftover in their pockets after the bills are paid, then they are totally indifferent as to what is happening in this country or the world. There is a minority of Americans that either care to take the time to be informed or even exercise their vote at the polls. **The strangest phenomenon with Connecticut is that almost half of gun owners are not registered to vote.**_So, even single issue Americans do not participate in the political process in CT._
**Lackluster Participation Allows for Coercive and Devise Measures to Take Hold**
_**As a result of a fragmented and disenfranchised electorate, those groups that are organized for any purpose, profit, ideology or disruption, combined with biased rhetoric disguised as news have created an opportunity to advance their agenda. The media "cycle" is 24-hours and the majority of air-time is devoted to segments with opinions under the guise of news rather than simply reporting the actual news. Despite tons of availability of airtime, those with opposing views face an uphill climb to get their views in front of the American public and electorate. Even "left" or "right" media will not give outside or longshot candidates a chance at reaching the voter unless they buy ad time or do something controversial. I personally struggled to get interviews and when I was interviewed for 30 minutes or more, the end result was a two or three minute soundbite. **_**Walter Cronkite who sat and reported facts would be rolling over in his grave.**
**Our Government Has Some Very Misguided Policies**
Over the past 4 years, our government sided with criminals who they regard as victims while the true victims suffer. These are victims that are are physically injured or killed without justice. It is nearly impossible for a victim to get through these trials and court appearances that require an additional sacrifice of time, energy and resources (at their own expense) to see the perpetrators get their day in court. This can be sustained only when these cases rise to national attention.
_**De-criminalizing Shoplifting**_
2020 began the era of decriminalizing shoplifting which created mass stealing. It resulted in rings of shoplifters putting stores (_especially independent retailers_) out of business while destroying jobs and the hard work that business owners put into building and running their own businesses. The result has destroyed the American Dream and the crime was portrayed by the AOC-Left Wing fantasy that these criminals are' desperate' people are 'stealing bread to feed their children'. The crimes they committed were thefts from designer retailers.
_**Shoplifting, Covid, and the fear of unsafe shopping created the opportunity for online shopping to grow and the promotion of isolationism over social interaction in any form. Why participate in life when you can zoom into it? The real victims were children and those that thrive in a public setting. The result is a mental-health crisis from social media bullying, PTSD from isolation, and a generation that cannot communicate without a cell phone.**_
**Open-Borders**
Joe Biden transformed the immigration landscape with an unnecessary executive order and federal challenges to states like Texas. This inappropriate lax border not only enabled millions of economic migrants to enter our country to take refuge at fine hotels in our cities, but also allowed criminals, drug dealers, gangs, terrorists and military age men from countries that are our adversaries to enter the country. Who would ever think that Tren de Aragua would become a term known by most Americans. In addition, it resulted in at least 300,000 unaccompanied children that have been lost been "lost" by DHS, and that number could be higher than 500,000. **These are children who cannot fend for themselves and are likely have become victims of trafficking.**
**The Real Costs of Immigration - NY As a Real Example**
New York has maintained some of the best data on the real costs of immigration. According to a recent report of NY Comptroller DiNapoli, NYC and NYS combined are spending $1.5 billion dollars per month on illegals (as of September 2024). That is over 5% of the state and city budgets and has resulted in cuts to other critical services. **It has also increased the volume in HHC hospitals at the expense of our urban poor who depend on these institutions as their only form of medical care.**
**Where is the Legal Immigration Process that Built this Nation?**
We are a nation of legal immigrants and their descendants. It is no surprise that legal immigration creates stricter hurdles and responsibilities than illegal immigration. Those willing to follow the legal process must be vetted, have a sponsor and demonstrate an ability to support themselves and can contribute to our society. The modern illegal immigrant only cares to take and rely on government support at a great cost to our veterans and our poor.
**Education**
Our education system, the key to creating productive citizens, has been hijacked by woke ideology, which takes precedent over teaching the skills necessary to support democracy and work in a 21st century economy. Students in poorer communities are deprived of an education due to dysfunctional schools that cost the taxpayers dearly while having no accountability to the voters.
Possible solutions include charter schools and vouchers that would provide other options and result in competition. The opposition is intense as the teachers union is one of the most powerful political forces. It is time students come first and teachers are held accountable as their failures have robbed our youth of the hope and opportunity. The result is generational dependents on the government because they are being deprived of the skills necessary to become our future workforce. Their lack of training results in the expansion of the controversial H1-B visa program that also applies to less technical jobs.
**Why do the victims of bad policy continue to vote for the same result?**
On the campaign trail, and especially at the polls on election day, it is nearly impossible to inform and educate a voter about a platform that will improve their lives and the opportunities for their children. Fear of losing their insufficient benefits for a better future is enough to intimidated a voter to pick up a palm card and continue to support the politicians who have taken away their future.
**College Education is a Privilege**
As the cost of secondary education increases with annual private college tuition at $43,505 and public in-state tuition at $11,011 (Source US News & World Report), the education our children need has to be able to service student-loan debt. According to the according to the [National Association of Colleges and Employers](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e89ef8a0-b165-4c78-890b-ee466a3186c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (NACE), the average income with a college degree is currently at with the average tuition at $68,516. There are not enough careers that our college children can obtain with certain college degrees.
We must wake up parents and students and show them that there is a better way. We need leaders in these communities who will fight for them rather than themselves. These parents must be informed of opportunities and our teachers and guidance counselors should be the first line to identify students that could benefit from alternate education (including technical schools) where those students will graduate with a meaningful career in a field with a labor shortage. This is where government is needed and our Connecticut voters must realize that a one-party system with no accountability is not democracy and it has failed. It is hard to blame others when one party controls the entire state.
We have everything necessary for Connecticut to become a booming state that attracts businesses and jobs except for one thing, bad government. That needs to change and the state that manufactured technical machinery of parts and technology to put the man on the moon can rise once again and not just as a defense contractor like Electric Boat or Sikorsky.
**World Turmoil and Rising Dangers**
_China_
Our world is becoming increasingly dangerous. We have wars in Europe and the Middle East and China is unchecked on Taiwan due to a current lack of big-stick diplomacy. China is also following the playbook of pre-WWII Japan by expanding its sphere of influence throughout the third-world and creating a network of military bases that is growing. Yet, our government has done nothing to counteract any of this activity. The US was asleep for Japan and that lead to the attack on Pearl Harbor and the involvement of the US in WWII with some of the largest casualties to American soldiers in the Pacific. I think it could have been prevented. Yet, here we are again and history is repeating itself and once again we are asleep. **Communication lines and pipelines are destroyed by Chinese ships that drag anchors across the ocean floor and no one even knows it.**
_**It is time to wake up before it is too late. China has a lot of weaknesses: an economy in trouble, high unemployment, an aging population and many Asian adversaries that can work together to corral and control China. We need to provide alternatives to these Chinese controlled bases, ports and manufacturing zones throughout the world by competition. Tariffs are the first lever to pull while long-term sustainable plans are implemented. The Chinese have even taken over the ports necessary to the passage of ships through the Panama Canal.**_
_Middle East_
The Middle East needs a strong Israel and moderate Arab states to act as the proxies for the United State to render Iran powerless and destabilize the radical Islamic Republic. These toxic regimes have oppressed their citizens that are old enough to know that there were more western governments in the Middle East that can be restored by the destruction of their current fundamentalist governments.
_Ukraine_
We must end the war in Ukraine. While it is really a no win situation for Russia, it is a yearning for a past that cannot be revived. This conflict has cost them, men, money, and geopolitical harm. The Ukrainians have suffered tremendously and need to rebuild their country. This is the first invasion of a European country since WWII and it should be the last one. The US has to stop writing checks with no end in site.
**Healthcare**
I entered politics on a single issue - Healthcare. Once I looked under the hood, I realized healthcare was like all problems in our government: Overly regulated, administrative laden with meaningless policies and employment positions and a sector with a continued decline in performance with rising costs.
Our healthcare system is headed in the wrong direction. Medical care should be about what it has always been about, patients with an illness undergoing treatment or surgery to save or improve their quality of life, preventive care to stop chronic illnesses from progressing, early detection and treatment of cancer and other debilitating diseases to save lives and improve patient outcomes. Yet, that is not what healthcare is about today. There is an entire healthcare bureaucracy totally dedicated to expansion and its' effect is crippling care while raising costs and decreasing the quality of our healthcare system. **We are supposed to have improved healthcare as technology and innovation increase and that is not the case.**
Anti-trust laws which were supposedly designed to stimulate competition, have had the opposite effect. The solo and small family practices, that were the most cost-effective mode of primary care, went out of business or were swallowed by the hospital networks. Hospital groups became the largest private employers in the State of Connecticut and the consolidation has resulted in stronger bargaining power for the hospitals with increased reimbursement rates at the expense to the healthcare consumer and insurance company. These hospital networks have not benefitted from economies of scale as administrative costs have risen.
Most markets have single healthcare insurance companies that dominate the market. This is the most profitable model because less competition leads to higher premiums and lower payments to hospitals and other providers. This also leads to shortages. For example, there are cities throughout the country, and counties in New York where there are shortages or lack of obstetric care.
_Medicare for All Is Not the Solution_
Many have argued that a Medicare for All takeover of healthcare is the answer. I believe that government is the problem as it has resulted in a healthcare bureaucracy where healthcare dollars are diverted from care to regulatory compliance. _**Thee average physician spends 20 hours per week doing the computer data entry required by the bureaucracy rather than treating patients.**_ The antiquated anti-trust laws of the 19th and early 20th century are obsolete and destroyed competition in healthcare. The result is monopsonies and markets controlled by few. Such regulation has transformed Medical care to an assembly line industry moving patients along the line in the order in which they are received. Regulation misses the point of the needs of patients to be treated and not processed through a system where the data in the system is more important than the active listening skills needed to diagnose, treat and heal patients.
Neither the patients nor the physicians and other healthcare providers are happy with the current system. As a result, healthcare has some of the highest worker burnout at all levels and will only get worse.
This anticompetitive, bureaucratic healthcare system has led to skyrocketing healthcare premiums that are unaffordable. The system needs to be fixed so that people and businesses can afford healthcare.
_Healthcare Solutions_
Pilot programs are necessary to create and scale up better models. Large institutions that have the resources to provide the expensive tertiary care, invest in expensive technology and conduct the medical research necessary to advance our healthcare system are essential. However, they are not the best option for providing cost effective primary care.
_Final Thoughts_
It is my hope for the New Year that our country, under new leadership of President Trump, will reverse the problems that have been created by prior administrations. Our country needs to return to its core values, our citizens need to be informed and engaged and a lawful society must returns. Our enemies need to know that we have woken up, our allies need to know that they can depend on us once again, new alliances will need to formed and deterrence must be meaningful to convince our enemies that war is not the answer.
Our healthcare system needs massive overhauling. Competition and choice need to replace bureaucracy. Care must be provided in a setting where physicians and other healthcare providers need to be able to focus on their primary goal of providing patient care. Patients need to know that healthcare is for them and not for the benefit of other third parties. Health insurance and government expenditures on healthcare need to be affordable. We can make this happen.
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**

Lackluster Participation Allows for Coercive and Devise Measures to Take Hold As a result of a fragmented and disenfranchised electorate, those groups that are organized for any purpose, profit, ideology or disruption, combined with biased rhetoric disguised as news have created an opportunity to advance their agenda. The media "cycle" is 24-hours and the majority of air-time is devoted to segments with opinions under the guise of news rather than simply reporting the actual news. Despite tons of availability of airtime, those with opposing views face an uphill climb to get their views in front of the American public and electorate. Even "left" or "right" media will not give outside or longshot candidates a chance at reaching the voter unless they buy ad time or do something controversial. I personally struggled to get interviews and when I was interviewed for 30 minutes or more, the end result was a two or three minute soundbite. Walter Cronkite who sat and reported facts would be rolling over in his grave. Our Government Has Some Very Misguided Policies Over the past 4 years, our government sided with criminals who they regard as victims while the true victims suffer. These are victims that are are physically injured or killed without justice. It is nearly impossible for a victim to get through these trials and court appearances that require an additional sacrifice of time, energy and resources (at their own expense) to see the perpetrators get their day in court. This can be sustained only when these cases rise to national attention. De-criminalizing Shoplifting 2020 began the era of decriminalizing shoplifting which created mass stealing. It resulted in rings of shoplifters putting stores (especially independent retailers) out of business while destroying jobs and the hard work that business owners put into building and running their own businesses. The result has destroyed the American Dream and the crime was portrayed by the AOC-Left Wing fantasy that these criminals are' desperate' people are 'stealing bread to feed their children'. The crimes they committed were thefts from designer retailers. Shoplifting, Covid, and the fear of unsafe shopping created the opportunity for online shopping to grow and the promotion of isolationism over social interaction in any form. Why participate in life when you can zoom into it? The real victims were children and those that thrive in a public setting. The result is a mental-health crisis from social media bullying, PTSD from isolation, and a generation that cannot communicate without a cell phone. Open-Borders Joe Biden transformed the immigration landscape with an unnecessary executive order and federal challenges to states like Texas. This inappropriate lax border not only enabled millions of economic migrants to enter our country to take refuge at fine hotels in our cities, but also allowed criminals, drug dealers, gangs, terrorists and military age men from countries that are our adversaries to enter the country. Who would ever think that Tren de Aragua would become a term known by most Americans. In addition, it resulted in at least 300,000 unaccompanied children that have been lost been "lost" by DHS, and that number could be higher than 500,000. These are children who cannot fend for themselves and are likely have become victims of trafficking. The Real Costs of Immigration - NY As a Real Example New York has maintained some of the best data on the real costs of immigration. According to a recent report of NY Comptroller DiNapoli, NYC and NYS combined are spending $1.5 billion dollars per month on illegals (as of September 2024). That is over 5% of the state and city budgets and has resulted in cuts to other critical services. It has also increased the volume in HHC hospitals at the expense of our urban poor who depend on these institutions as their only form of medical care. Where is the Legal Immigration Process that Built this Nation? We are a nation of legal immigrants and their descendants. It is no surprise that legal immigration creates stricter hurdles and responsibilities than illegal immigration. Those willing to follow the legal process must be vetted, have a sponsor and demonstrate an ability to support themselves and can contribute to our society. The modern illegal immigrant only cares to take and rely on government support at a great cost to our veterans and our poor. Education Our education system, the key to creating productive citizens, has been hijacked by woke ideology, which takes precedent over teaching the skills necessary to support democracy and work in a 21st century economy. Students in poorer communities are deprived of an education due to dysfunctional schools that cost the taxpayers dearly while having no accountability to the voters. Possible solutions include charter schools and vouchers that would provide other options and result in competition. The opposition is intense as the teachers union is one of the most powerful political forces. It is time students come first and teachers are held accountable as their failures have robbed our youth of the hope and opportunity. The result is generational dependents on the government because they are being deprived of the skills necessary to become our future workforce. Their lack of training results in the expansion of the controversial H1-B visa program that also applies to less technical jobs. Why do the victims of bad policy continue to vote for the same result? On the campaign trail, and especially at the polls on election day, it is nearly impossible to inform and educate a voter about a platform that will improve their lives and the opportunities for their children. Fear of losing their insufficient benefits for a better future is enough to intimidated a voter to pick up a palm card and continue to support the politicians who have taken away their future. College Education is a Privilege As the cost of secondary education increases with annual private college tuition at $43,505 and public in-state tuition at $11,011 (Source US News & World Report), the education our children need has to be able to service student-loan debt. According to the according to the (NACE), the average income with a college degree is currently at with the average tuition at $68,516. There are not enough careers that our college children can obtain with certain college degrees. We must wake up parents and students and show them that there is a better way. We need leaders in these communities who will fight for them rather than themselves. These parents must be informed of opportunities and our teachers and guidance counselors should be the first line to identify students that could benefit from alternate education (including technical schools) where those students will graduate with a meaningful career in a field with a labor shortage. This is where government is needed and our Connecticut voters must realize that a one-party system with no accountability is not democracy and it has failed. It is hard to blame others when one party controls the entire state. We have everything necessary for Connecticut to become a booming state that attracts businesses and jobs except for one thing, bad government. That needs to change and the state that manufactured technical machinery of parts and technology to put the man on the moon can rise once again and not just as a defense contractor like Electric Boat or Sikorsky. World Turmoil and Rising Dangers China Our world is becoming increasingly dangerous. We have wars in Europe and the Middle East and China is unchecked on Taiwan due to a current lack of big-stick diplomacy. China is also following the playbook of pre-WWII Japan by expanding its sphere of influence throughout the third-world and creating a network of military bases that is growing. Yet, our government has done nothing to counteract any of this activity. The US was asleep for Japan and that lead to the attack on Pearl Harbor and the involvement of the US in WWII with some of the largest casualties to American soldiers in the Pacific. I think it could have been prevented. Yet, here we are again and history is repeating itself and once again we are asleep. Communication lines and pipelines are destroyed by Chinese ships that drag anchors across the ocean floor and no one even knows it. It is time to wake up before it is too late. China has a lot of weaknesses: an economy in trouble, high unemployment, an aging population and many Asian adversaries that can work together to corral and control China. We need to provide alternatives to these Chinese controlled bases, ports and manufacturing zones throughout the world by competition. Tariffs are the first lever to pull while long-term sustainable plans are implemented. The Chinese have even taken over the ports necessary to the passage of ships through the Panama Canal. Middle East The Middle East needs a strong Israel and moderate Arab states to act as the proxies for the United State to render Iran powerless and destabilize the radical Islamic Republic. These toxic regimes have oppressed their citizens that are old enough to know that there were more western governments in the Middle East that can be restored by the destruction of their current fundamentalist governments. Ukraine We must end the war in Ukraine. While it is really a no win situation for Russia, it is a yearning for a past that cannot be revived. This conflict has cost them, men, money, and geopolitical harm. The Ukrainians have suffered tremendously and need to rebuild their country. This is the first invasion of a European country since WWII and it should be the last one. The US has to stop writing checks with no end in site. Healthcare I entered politics on a single issue - Healthcare. Once I looked under the hood, I realized healthcare was like all problems in our government: Overly regulated, administrative laden with meaningless policies and employment positions and a sector with a continued decline in performance with rising costs. Our healthcare system is headed in the wrong direction. Medical care should be about what it has always been about, patients with an illness undergoing treatment or surgery to save or improve their quality of life, preventive care to stop chronic illnesses from progressing, early detection and treatment of cancer and other debilitating diseases to save lives and improve patient outcomes. Yet, that is not what healthcare is about today. There is an entire healthcare bureaucracy totally dedicated to expansion and its' effect is crippling care while raising costs and decreasing the quality of our healthcare system. We are supposed to have improved healthcare as technology and innovation increase and that is not the case. Anti-trust laws which were supposedly designed to stimulate competition, have had the opposite effect. The solo and small family practices, that were the most cost-effective mode of primary care, went out of business or were swallowed by the hospital networks. Hospital groups became the largest private employers in the State of Connecticut and the consolidation has resulted in stronger bargaining power for the hospitals with increased reimbursement rates at the expense to the healthcare consumer and insurance company. These hospital networks have not benefitted from economies of scale as administrative costs have risen. Most markets have single healthcare insurance companies that dominate the market. This is the most profitable model because less competition leads to higher premiums and lower payments to hospitals and other providers. This also leads to shortages. For example, there are cities throughout the country, and counties in New York where there are shortages or lack of obstetric care. Medicare for All Is Not the Solution Many have argued that a Medicare for All takeover of healthcare is the answer. I believe that government is the problem as it has resulted in a healthcare bureaucracy where healthcare dollars are diverted from care to regulatory compliance. Thee average physician spends 20 hours per week doing the computer data entry required by the bureaucracy rather than treating patients. The antiquated anti-trust laws of the 19th and early 20th century are obsolete and destroyed competition in healthcare. The result is monopsonies and markets controlled by few. Such regulation has transformed Medical care to an assembly line industry moving patients along the line in the order in which they are received. Regulation misses the point of the needs of patients to be treated and not processed through a system where the data in the system is more important than the active listening skills needed to diagnose, treat and heal patients. Neither the patients nor the physicians and other healthcare providers are happy with the current system. As a result, healthcare has some of the highest worker burnout at all levels and will only get worse. This anticompetitive, bureaucratic healthcare system has led to skyrocketing healthcare premiums that are unaffordable. The system needs to be fixed so that people and businesses can afford healthcare. Healthcare Solutions Pilot programs are necessary to create and scale up better models. Large institutions that have the resources to provide the expensive tertiary care, invest in expensive technology and conduct the medical research necessary to advance our healthcare system are essential. However, they are not the best option for providing cost effective primary care. Final Thoughts It is my hope for the New Year that our country, under new leadership of President Trump, will reverse the problems that have been created by prior administrations. Our country needs to return to its core values, our citizens need to be informed and engaged and a lawful society must returns. Our enemies need to know that we have woken up, our allies need to know that they can depend on us once again, new alliances will need to formed and deterrence must be meaningful to convince our enemies that war is not the answer. Our healthcare system needs massive overhauling. Competition and choice need to replace bureaucracy. Care must be provided in a setting where physicians and other healthcare providers need to be able to focus on their primary goal of providing patient care. Patients need to know that healthcare is for them and not for the benefit of other third parties. Health insurance and government expenditures on healthcare need to be affordable. We can make this happen. Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.** Dr. Michael Goldstein P lease spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way. Please subscribe and support. Michael's Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Michael's Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein 🇺🇸 ? ?

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Happy New Year, Colorado!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com [https://jenaforcolorado.com]
Peter,
As we welcome the New Year, I want to extend my heartfelt wishes for a joyful 2025 to your loved ones and you.
2024 was a year of growth, challenges, and opportunities, and I am incredibly proud of how our great state continued to move forward. Voters took a historic step to codify abortion rights into the state constitution and protect same-sex marriage. By participating in our democracy, voters did their part to continue making Colorado a wonderful place to live.
In the coming year, as we face Trump’s presidency, I will remain steadfast in my commitment to our democracy and our shared values. Whether ensuring accessible elections, supporting businesses, or protecting our freedoms, we are dedicated to making Colorado a place where everyone can succeed.
While the tides of the federal leadership is changing, let’s work together to build an even brighter future for Colorado—one that reflects the values of fairness, opportunity, and community that define us.
Best wishes,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]

alive while riding on a New York City subway car earlier in December,
ending days of public speculation.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter, Happy New Year!

In 2024, we had some tough battles, but you were always by my side during the fight. I am ready to continue to work for progress in our community in 2025.

As we are set to begin a new year filled with challenges on many issues, I’m certain that there’s nothing we can’t accomplish if we do it together.

Your support is what keeps me going and I look forward to implementing positive change with my colleagues in the new year.

Wishing you a joyous new year,

Mike

clean_body: Final chance to lock in climate action progress | | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, Happy New Year! As we step into 2025, we're reminded that our fight for the planet is only just beginning—and we need your help to make this year count. This is your final (and we mean final!) chance to have your gift go 4X as far to defend climate progress and build a just, clean energy future. | | A generous donor extended the 4X match for one more day, recognizing how critical our work is and how much is at stake. Your support today will help us ramp up efforts for bold, state-based climate policies, create millions of clean energy jobs, and ensure the progress we've made is built to last. Evergreen Action is leading the charge to defeat the climate crisis—and we're ready to take on 2025 with renewed energy and determination. But we can't do it without you. Don't miss out! Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can make 2025 a year of progress, justice, and a thriving clean energy future! | | With hope and gratitude, All of us at Evergreen Action | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2024 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. I don’t want to alarm you, but for once, I’m feeling optimistic. _**We reached our end-of-year goal before midnight last night! **_ Between this and winning in November against impossible odds, it’s clear that when we work together, this team is capable of remarkable things. [**But we cannot rest on our laurels — there is a LOT of work to do this year. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Happy New Year, team! Goodbye and good riddance to 2024, and hello to 2025. I don’t want to alarm you, but for once, I’m feeling optimistic. We reached our end-of-year goal before midnight last night! Between this and winning in November against impossible odds, it’s clear that when we work together, this team is capable of remarkable things. = = I’m ready to get to work defending voting rights, reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, Israel, and more. These are all things Congress can and should do. I believe we can defend our rights, block extremist policies, and retake power in the next election. It won’t be easy, but it sure as hell is worth the fight. name: Lara Trump
subject: Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids
body:
The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRSFDt3M7duVn6AZujDrW77ML_Ikh87OAungDsZ4FN1wyRAj0Inv4VikgKc20Nfb6IcfO2uc3xpv0Pq8ccx9FxcoYB_mQp3rtImKAU80ItF6MH4VuQOig1ly5mB9lkX6ToFZ0ARWNF6FqHWW7pcZAoxsA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRSW1M5r2Hk1Ab9vS5u-M-xfIXiqYdSMwqmXLEjsr4_il4AAXjoCRN4Q3MRnS-koERHjHsgjSYSnY1_jHR1dsLtiiXVFdz9nbE3GPBgSNgHB_G1ecIRrhvTAoX0lL_iYI978RBnBtau0imBfo9ByL5f-Q%3D%3D)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRS7VF7ZMekSoobjoScW5Uk8bcDTxmnZZRGKzJIHO7bVmz1WVniP3q17ZAGRSl8Y5wPYH1aWA9DI7yVDC1XWvfKIM2DZCRAZ2I1PsvAryso3hL5Ii6-DDfjyyDwiYUFckgTs1BP3gn6OzMKJPze5VldLw%3D%3D)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRSgv32eAfWs_KCCSyfk7FYQMsZOdQgpgCuJOALOBTqHE05IMMLSQNjqjhamgcdvw74C7rVqqUTMpQGxhGIEuOT1Zj1MXmy7kl0sbuC2kLqA2pqGteEpdh3edy_k8B9ZIPAtFecZ6kFPuSN_fugUXAjkA%3D%3D)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRSs5X8zVPCaM6BdfwjeflquH5iFKztxSskTWnmmVeN5Btr-EGCd6yYS9v3wnlO0H5FvVtd7lI-EVZs3D8139N-rAtz9fsIXDM-5uwWQKizE0unmtg5ILPPRqMDzf3HkpFSJe3l4xsjy4boIbTQv0IiyQ%3D%3D)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ae8cd0116a444399b59c15dcaa4ab31&_e=pqm2kWxw4xnpeAIaNv2d_5jdmTUpnPHF0pfUde99GoJaiWu0Eh_1PjjpFG3OpWv_b7p1YjX0FZ86HOrnBhzIKxazAaCFw6Dhd5hcF-S012EGSo20I4FIgOdtOvbPKTHY7khDB1H_-l7d8HeQIIDES25h0BT4P96T98vm9OpD92mMm0p5i9-6vfoACiJdd1SSNwTH8Tm_PKm0M6wEDKtQ1MsJAUHoV4oNuiZQys999_7s8xjAWAJ0nNSt80dDcRRSLQ_3zq4zTesATct3lmhMQkklHbqyDkF3lbdA1bz8uIMBFlkK8hrKQTHqASzlzPFepz6N9FMdbl6J1QXx4GJjOasLDSrZIz1coaac0VPif087NDOIX65tFzYhhohkU73jAld8a53Y_U-e7ehTVnrL6Q%3D%3D), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---

clean_body: The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

Happy new year, Peter! I wanted to reach out after yesterday’s end of year fundraising deadline to express my gratitude. Thanks to supporters like you, we reached our fundraising goal before the ball dropped at midnight. Now, as we kick off a new year, I’m headed back to DC to be sworn in as a member of the 119th Congress, and for that, I cannot thank you enough. I’m truly humbled by your willingness to donate and share my vision for North Carolina. There will always be work to be done, but none of it is possible without supporters like you, Peter. Together, I know we can bring even more progress to North Carolina and our nation as a whole. Let’s keep pushing! With gratitude, Valerie

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=EKnv8gVgcMW14rIR5zC%2FvMCSFJGekVvW%2ByjTy4Uqk02UfMvSsRiWUQ9Gx0BEJYaqo4U%2Feo7tfFu9K5w63xD7eAOPppouTMyhKUH5LxGzFuEvsKedYkniokcR%2B8zz35wLVb0ACek92GZnLwlwjYQPSd81Y1SjMLTpOjYAGDNbEYToaawxZK7BE12SXOWROLrBCXuzKo8gWrZqMv%2Fkkw2o%2F5EDaoPQmzCZh%2BDN0v7NM6x5YK1CEjFp0i262ddAwwyiJQ3iJrilk2BZFHMwlHHFZytHY%2FB%2BEz5N0WRvAcySmd%2FTnwPU3p%2BKvceI0D2rAl2fcdKXqrgyAj%2Bkl0%2BBfklJnlju1WQImyJKyCsIbuWWN1SMuItLpF37vQ7zd4r0kR%2BPg5BdE1p0kZBJRfOiOMW4W858VuWG9uaxEpKumqHSD8tFd7qf%2FJX8Jsx%2BCkVjYA9x]

# [#]
Peter, happy new year!

I wanted to send a quick message to thank you for your support before yesterday’s end of year fundraising deadline. Thanks to dedicated supporters like you, we were able to reach our fundraising goal and end 2024 on a high note.

After celebrating the new year with family and friends, I’m headed to Washington D.C. where I will be sworn in as your Congressman on Friday. So, amidst all the excitement and revving up for what’s to come next – I wanted to make sure I set aside time to express my gratitude.

Thank you, Peter, for everything. Your grassroots support has propelled me to heights greater than I could have ever imagined. I am truly humbled by your generosity and unwavering commitment to uplifting my mission.

I hope to make you proud.

— George

P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to donate before yesterday’s deadline, you can chip in $ or any amount now to help us start 2025 strong! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25?amount=]
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

After celebrating the new year with family and friends, I’m headed to Washington D.C. where I will be sworn in as your Congressman on Friday. So, amidst all the excitement and revving up for what’s to come next – I wanted to make sure I set aside time to express my gratitude. Thank you, Peter, for everything. Your grassroots support has propelled me to heights greater than I could have ever imagined. I am truly humbled by your generosity and unwavering commitment to uplifting my mission. I hope to make you proud. — George P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to donate before yesterday’s deadline, you can chip in $ or any amount now to help us start 2025 strong! [=] [] [] [] For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] .

---
| Happy New Year Team!
---
| |
---
| Friends,
Tracy and I want to wish you and yours a Happy New Year. Thanks to your prayers, your vote, hard work, a huge Trump endorsement, and the grace of God, 2024 was incredible. We get sworn in to congress this Friday!
---
| Mar-A-Lago Celebration
---
| | | |
---
The best party ever! We were honored to be invited to Mar-A-Lago to celebrate New Years. Thank you President Trump, Melania & team for an incredible experience. The music had us dancing the whole time and featured too many different artists to list but among them was the Commodores, CeeLo Green, Lara Trump, and more. Fellow veteran, our next VP, JD vance was there, Don King, and others. We sang Happy Birthday to Don Jr and spoke with Senator Ted Cruz and Reps. Tom Emmer, Jason Smith, and Guy Reschenthaler. We also spoke with Elon Musk about the oversight committee and DOGE. Tracy and I are fired up for 2025!
| | [](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z-dJ5_Wq14b7r12x1zofDV47rkaKT52jgaoC-LxtDzKjTSP8njZWEdb2O5OYQET4aR0udh2AIpFFl0h_kLtXrUfK8U6KZfgX5Bw3-8qAjrm4HrUVvh4DPoCAw3kkFyNiGXOcnql2GTxiE1vBPQls8sYVG2XiXPoO7PeIR6-kDLrbA1nOefG7EK0dgunVLUYWBjcE1IeR8m8=&c=2fR8XVOceN37umBP4Z19eM7mlLdqHuT_hcvC3oI-bvYscAmN2NLFEQ==&ch=vuuQqLUv7TqKOD3-8Gl_s17pS8_pxUjhE6VVKxOlOoLK6gGLDPEVug==)

| |

|
---
|
---
| |
---
Actor/ Comedian [Terrence Williams](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z-dJ5_Wq14b7r12x1zofDV47rkaKT52jgaoC-LxtDzKjTSP8njZWEdb2O5OYQET4de3-W7iIgDH39w-oOZ_LVXeY3S6QJpd_eU9lg38OQofiO_hHww88D0MaK0BKtDky9Uhi1QnR-6V6_nrtTSZCzj7vEX4TbVFg&c=2fR8XVOceN37umBP4Z19eM7mlLdqHuT_hcvC3oI-bvYscAmN2NLFEQ==&ch=vuuQqLUv7TqKOD3-8Gl_s17pS8_pxUjhE6VVKxOlOoLK6gGLDPEVug==)
---
| |
---
UFC fighter Tito Ortiz
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| 2025
---
| Our plan for 2025 is to continue the teamwork, our efforts to unite Virginians and do our part to help advance Trump's America First Agenda. We have a country to save!
Please keep up the prayers and the hard work this year so we can elect a republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and regain the majority in the House of Delegates!
---
| Praying for New Orleans
---
| My friend Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene is right, what happened in New Orleans was a terrorist attack. The enemy is not at the gate, the enemy is in the gate. So far reports say there are 15 dead and dozens wounded. Democrat America last policies have put us in grave danger and it very well could get worse. If you see something, say something, and do something. We are deeply saddened by the deaths in New Orleans last night and we are reminded evil does exist. Please keep the victims, their families, and our first responders in your thoughts and prayers.
---
| January 7 Special Election for State Senate
---
| Team,
We hope you are enjoying this time with family and friends. It was over a year ago today we answered the call to run for Congress after receiving countless requests to run due to reprehensible behavior, from constituents all over the district. Through the grace of God we won the 5th big with the most votes ever and I get sworn into Congress this Friday January 3rd. Thank you for the Teamwork!
Now we need to fill my, soon to be vacated, State Senate Seat with a remarkable young man and our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers.
Election Day is just a few days away and we need you to vote now early at your county registrars office or on Election Day January 7 at your normal voting precinct to ensure this seat remains in Republican hands. [You can donate to Luther Cifers campaign here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z-dJ5_Wq14b7r12x1zofDV47rkaKT52jgaoC-LxtDzKjTSP8njZWEQOP2VuTxV6zgE6OcO54lW1Z9gnG0kIGFWrufGCTeWIwOw0cyyLi_54rOeCA8X_AasSKAfY5o0w8hByoaHukwI1P3TvuEiOgYg==&c=2fR8XVOceN37umBP4Z19eM7mlLdqHuT_hcvC3oI-bvYscAmN2NLFEQ==&ch=vuuQqLUv7TqKOD3-8Gl_s17pS8_pxUjhE6VVKxOlOoLK6gGLDPEVug==)
---
| Weak and or selfish leadership along with the "wokeness" ideology have been destroying our country. I ran for Congress to help Trump Save America and make our military lethal. It will be an honor to represent the 5th Congressional District on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC) and the House Oversight Committee.
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria

clean_body: McGuire achives huge VA05 Vote Record | | | | == | == | Happy New Year Team! | | | Friends, Tracy and I want to wish you and yours a Happy New Year. Thanks to your prayers, your vote, hard work, a huge Trump endorsement, and the grace of God, 2024 was incredible. We get sworn in to congress this Friday! | Mar-A-Lago Celebration | | | | The best party ever! We were honored to be invited to Mar-A-Lago to celebrate New Years. Thank you President Trump, Melania & team for an incredible experience. The music had us dancing the whole time and featured too many different artists to list but among them was the Commodores, CeeLo Green, Lara Trump, and more. Fellow veteran, our next VP, JD vance was there, Don King, and others. We sang Happy Birthday to Don Jr and spoke with Senator Ted Cruz and Reps. Tom Emmer, Jason Smith, and Guy Reschenthaler. We also spoke with Elon Musk about the oversight committee and DOGE. Tracy and I are fired up for 2025! | | == == | | | | | | Actor/ Comedian == | | UFC fighter Tito Ortiz | | | | | | | | | | | 2025 | Our plan for 2025 is to continue the teamwork, our efforts to unite Virginians and do our part to help advance Trump's America First Agenda. We have a country to save! Please keep up the prayers and the hard work this year so we can elect a republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and regain the majority in the House of Delegates! | Praying for New Orleans | My friend Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene is right, what happened in New Orleans was a terrorist attack. The enemy is not at the gate, the enemy is in the gate. So far reports say there are 15 dead and dozens wounded. Democrat America last policies have put us in grave danger and it very well could get worse. If you see something, say something, and do something. We are deeply saddened by the deaths in New Orleans last night and we are reminded evil does exist. Please keep the victims, their families, and our first responders in your thoughts and prayers. | January 7 Special Election for State Senate | Team, We hope you are enjoying this time with family and friends. It was over a year ago today we answered the call to run for Congress after receiving countless requests to run due to reprehensible behavior, from constituents all over the district. Through the grace of God we won the 5th big with the most votes ever and I get sworn into Congress this Friday January 3rd. Thank you for the Teamwork! Now we need to fill my, soon to be vacated, State Senate Seat with a remarkable young man and our Republican nominee, Luther Cifers. Election Day is just a few days away and we need you to vote now early at your county registrars office or on Election Day January 7 at your normal voting precinct to ensure this seat remains in Republican hands. == | Weak and or selfish leadership along with the "wokeness" ideology have been destroying our country. I ran for Congress to help Trump Save America and make our military lethal. It will be an honor to represent the 5th Congressional District on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC) and the House Oversight Committee. | For God and Country, | State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

name: Matt Shinners, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Communications Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=1)
---
Wednesday, January 01, 2025 | Peter -- Matt here again! I oversee our communications operation, as well. **What Went Well** In 2024, especially as we drove towards the election, we had a large amount of content production. We regularly put out endorsement announcements, and we were able to create slates to appeal to people interested in certain geographies, backgrounds, and even certain types of races (e.g., School Board). We streamlined our approval processes to get material out faster, and we launched several successful grassroots fundraising campaigns. Finally, we revamped our website. This included a refresh of our values, which went through a process involving our state teams. It also made it more dynamic and focused on getting people to take action to advance Forward goals. **Lessons Learned** While we had a lot of successes, we also learned some lessons we plan to take into 2025. First, people respond to people. Communications around abstract reform concepts didn’t perform nearly as well as stories of our volunteers, state leads, and candidates fighting for reform. We need to lean more on content creation—especially video—featuring Forward members. Second, we need to make our social media more engaging. Rather than posting information, we need to put out more polls, questions, and conversation starters. We need our online presence to welcome people in and show them that we value their opinion. That’s one of the reasons you’ll see a link for feedback in each of these emails! Finally, we need to create more templates for both internal and external use. The form doesn’t matter as much as what is said in the content, so we should make it easy for people to put out branded material. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=2)

**2025 Projects**
* Build more relationships with members of the press and pitch more stories
* Making it easier for our membership to create content that we feature
* Supporter engagement through regular polls and surveys
* Logo / merch refresh - check out the [new merch on our store now](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=AZxX1gRc1ZIldC6Z5gmcUhFjv3OqlIek-AWug6Ddv7c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=3)!

If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=4 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=4)
---
Happy New Year,
Matt Shinners
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=5)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms&n=10) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Happy New Year!!
body:
Many have asked why I’m running for County Executive again. The answer is simple.. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae%26ss_email_id%3D6775bb64ae26c41879038b09%26ss_campaign_name%3DHappy%2BNew%2BYear%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-01-01T22%253A02%253A24Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=3VxJIl63blTR8yH-UN2mT_z5M48%3D)
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D)
---
**A New Year, A New Chapter for Prince George’s County.** Many have asked why I’m running for County Executive again. The answer is simple: [**These are critical times, and experience matters more than ever.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D) Times are tough for most of us, and the challenges ahead demand proven leadership that knows how to deliver results.Our community is facing significant challenges. [**People are struggling to feel safe in their neighborhoods.** **We’re dealing with a staggering $190 million budget deficit.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D) And with the return of a Trump presidency, local leadership will be more important than ever to safeguard our progress and ensure Prince George’s County moves forward, not backward.We’ve been here before. In 2010, I took office when Prince George’s County faced similar difficulties. Back then, [**I didn’t just talk about solutions — I delivered them.** **Crime went down. Economic growth soared. Access to healthcare expanded.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D) We negotiated transformative deals that brought the FBI headquarters, MGM, Whole Foods, and a brand-new regional hospital to our county. Together, we achieved real progress.[**We can do it again.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D)
---
I know this job, and I care deeply about our communities. [**I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get back to business.** ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D)Prince George’s County needs a leader with the experience and vision to deliver results from day one.Our campaign is already gaining momentum. [**In just a few weeks, we’ve raised over $85,000, but our first fundraising filing deadline is only one week away.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D) We need to close the gap to reach our $100,000 goal, and your support can help us get there.[**Can I count on you to contribute $25, $250, or even $2,500 today?**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D) Every dollar makes a difference in building the campaign we need to move Prince George’s County forward in 2025.
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6775bb64ae26c41879038b09&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67754e5c178b905a2d6a03ae&l=en-US&s=_l567A6tGckWo2Kanxf_wpEmAag%3D)
---
Thank you for believing in our vision. Wishing you and your loved ones a Happy New Year filled with health, hope, and success!Warm regards,
---
|
---
**Rushern L. Baker III**
Candidate for County Executive

---

Hi Peter,

Trump’s cabinet picks are deeply troubling. He’s chosen Kari Lake, a MAGA loyalist who spreads election lies and divisive rhetoric, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., an anti-vaxxer who promotes dangerous misinformation about public health, and Dr. Oz, a TV personality who has openly suggested dismantling Social Security. These choices send a clear message: Trump’s administration isn’t focused on solving real problems—it’s laser-focused on chaos, conspiracy theories, and catering to extremists.

I know it’s disheartening to see this unfold. But these decisions underscore just how important it is to strengthen our resolve now. If we want to push back against Trump’s agenda, we need to rebuild our movement today—not months or years from now.

It starts with ensuring Democrats are ready to hold this administration accountable and defend the values we believe in: evidence-based policy, accessible healthcare, and a government that works for everyone—not just the powerful and well-connected.

[**Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to ensure we can stand up to Trump’s dangerous cabinet picks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99706183/520623245/577006200?amount=10&refcode=MD_FR_2025.01.01_picks_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0YzE3N2EtOGNjOC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yGGA_-Itlue5dbWh_y9CKU1eKBw_SbfQvf_eGZjgvtE=)

# New Orleans Terrorist Attack
### We Must Close The Border
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Jan 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
America must stand strong in the face of this heinous terrorist attack. It is past time to close the borders and defend our nation from those who wish to do us harm. Let us lift in prayer the families who have lost loved ones and those who are injured. May God bring comfort, healing, and justice. 🇺🇸🙏 #AmericaFirst #SecureTheBorder #PrayForTheVictims #DefendFreedom
