name: Matt Shinners, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Communications Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=1)
---
Wednesday, January 01, 2025 | Peter -- Matt here again! I oversee our communications operation, as well. **What Went Well** In 2024, especially as we drove towards the election, we had a large amount of content production. We regularly put out endorsement announcements, and we were able to create slates to appeal to people interested in certain geographies, backgrounds, and even certain types of races (e.g., School Board). We streamlined our approval processes to get material out faster, and we launched several successful grassroots fundraising campaigns. Finally, we revamped our website. This included a refresh of our values, which went through a process involving our state teams. It also made it more dynamic and focused on getting people to take action to advance Forward goals. **Lessons Learned** While we had a lot of successes, we also learned some lessons we plan to take into 2025. First, people respond to people. Communications around abstract reform concepts didn’t perform nearly as well as stories of our volunteers, state leads, and candidates fighting for reform. We need to lean more on content creation—especially video—featuring Forward members. Second, we need to make our social media more engaging. Rather than posting information, we need to put out more polls, questions, and conversation starters. We need our online presence to welcome people in and show them that we value their opinion. That’s one of the reasons you’ll see a link for feedback in each of these emails! Finally, we need to create more templates for both internal and external use. The form doesn’t matter as much as what is said in the content, so we should make it easy for people to put out branded material. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=2)

**2025 Projects**
* Build more relationships with members of the press and pitch more stories
* Making it easier for our membership to create content that we feature
* Supporter engagement through regular polls and surveys
* Logo / merch refresh - check out the [new merch on our store now](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=AZxX1gRc1ZIldC6Z5gmcUhFjv3OqlIek-AWug6Ddv7c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=3)!

If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=4 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=4)
---
Happy New Year,
Matt Shinners
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_comms_b&n=5)

Hello,

clean_body: The American people put their trust in President Trump when they elected him in a LANDSLIDE victory. Take the DOGE Survey today | | | | Friend, President Trump has selected Vivek Ramaswmany and Elon Musk to lead the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). This is an exciting development, and there's a lot of work to be done to cut the waste. But what should be on the chopping block first? "Complete the Official DOGE Survey and let House Republican leadership know what should be first to go!" | | | "COMPLETE DOGE SURVEY" DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY PATRIOT: Friend STATUS: INCOMPLETE | The American people put their trust in President Trump when they elected him in a LANDSLIDE victory. And he has pledged to cut wasteful spending and reform the government into a lean, mean, patriotic machine. The American people have FULL faith that Elon and Vivek will deliver. "But House Republicans need your help- which government program should DOGE cut? Let us know today." | | | "COMPLETE DOGE SURVEY" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85769?t=6&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85769?t=7&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85769?t=8&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85769?t=9&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85769?t=10&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18343%2E878179%2E8AOTVf).**

clean_body: | Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency. So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country. | Dear President Biden, I have one thing to say to you: Thank you. You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind. I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020. I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country. You capped prices on prescription drugs. You protected good-paying union jobs. You passed historic legislation addressing climate change. You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy. I have zero doubt in my mind: You will go down as a truly GREAT American President. I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do. | X A THANKFUL AMERICAN -The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
